mbx.attributes.balloon.halloween_candy_p: A sweet pumpkin full of candy smiling a bit too wide, like it knows something you don't.
mbx.attributes.balloon.ice_cream.lore: Floats like a dream, melts in the sun, don't let go or cry!
mbx.attributes.balloon.ice_cream.title: Ice Cream Balloon
mbx.attributes.balloon.lny_snake.lore: A floating tribute to the Wood Snake, gliding through the sky with wisdom. May it bring fortune… or judgment.
mbx.attributes.balloon.lny_snake.title: Lunar Snake Balloon
mbx.attributes.balloon.name: Balloon
mbx.attributes.balloon.pack_alpha_full.l: You supported the server during alpha. A real hero or someone with too much free time.
mbx.attributes.balloon.swirl_ice_cream.l: Hypnotic swirls, mesmerizing patterns, you're now distracted forever!
mbx.attributes.balloon.valentine_heart.l: A heart-shaped balloon floating with love… or helium. Just don't let go, or your romance might drift away.
mbx.attributes.balloon.xmas_tree.lore: Festive, flashy, full of cheer. Just try not to float too close to ceiling fans.
mbx.attributes.balloon.xmas_tree.title: Christmas tree
mbx.attributes.emote.box.lore: Why fight when you can aggressively jump in place? Gym bro approved.
mbx.attributes.emote.box.title: Box Jump
mbx.attributes.emote.cooking.lore: What's in the pot? Don't ask. Don't smell. Just run.
mbx.attributes.emote.cooking.title: Suspicious Stew
mbx.attributes.emote.crossed_arms.lore: Ultimate power stance. Judging silently. Probably disappointed.
mbx.attributes.emote.crossed_arms.title: Crossed Arms
mbx.attributes.emote.flip.lore: Totally unnecessary, but undeniably cool. 10/10 would flip again.
mbx.attributes.emote.flip.title: Backflip
mbx.attributes.emote.flying_head.lore: When the stress hits just right and your head bails first.
mbx.attributes.emote.flying_head.title: Losing Your Head
mbx.attributes.emote.gnome.lore: You've been GNOMED! Tiny menace with a tune. 100% cursed.
mbx.attributes.emote.gnome.title: Gnome
mbx.attributes.emote.guitar.lore: Strums softly under the moonlight, summons emotions, or boredom, depending on the audience.
mbx.attributes.emote.guitar.title: Acoustic Vibes
mbx.attributes.emote.handstand.lore: Look ma, no feet! Blood rushing to the brain, but worth the flex.
mbx.attributes.emote.handstand.title: Handstand
mbx.attributes.emote.kiss.lore: For allies, enemies, and total strangers. Consent optional.
mbx.attributes.emote.kiss.title: Blow a Kiss
mbx.attributes.emote.large_gap.lore: Physics? Never heard of it. Crossing the void in style. Try not to miss.
mbx.attributes.emote.large_gap.title: Leap of Faith
mbx.attributes.emote.marry_me.lore: Love is in the air. So are commitment issues. Better say yes.
mbx.attributes.emote.marry_me.title: Marriage Proposal
mbx.attributes.emote.meditation.lore: Floats in peace, ignores responsibilities, and taxes.
mbx.attributes.emote.meditation.title: Enlightenment
mbx.attributes.emote.military_walk.lore: Discipline. Honor. And absolutely no rhythm. Left, no—right!
mbx.attributes.emote.military_walk.title: March
mbx.attributes.emote.name: Emote
mbx.attributes.emote.nature_aura.lore: Leaves swirl, birds sing, and allergies attack. Green and dramatic.
mbx.attributes.emote.nature_aura.title: Nature's Aura
mbx.attributes.emote.possessed.lore: Floats mid-air, screams internally, and has zero chill.
mbx.attributes.emote.possessed.title: Possessed
mbx.attributes.emote.puddle.lore: Stares at rats jumping in water. Religious experience. You wouldn't understand.
mbx.attributes.emote.puddle.title: Puddle Watcher
mbx.attributes.emote.rat_dance.lore: Tiny rat. Big moves. Unholy energy. Pure vibes. You're welcome.
mbx.attributes.emote.rat_dance.title: Rat Dance
mbx.attributes.emote.rich.lore: Bathes in gold, flexes on peasants, still broke emotionally.
mbx.attributes.emote.rich.title: Filthy Rich
mbx.attributes.emote.rock_aura.lore: Levitates. Rocks float. Ultimate badass mode. Environment not included.
mbx.attributes.emote.rock_aura.title: Stone Cold Aura
mbx.attributes.emote.sit.lore: Sometimes you just gotta plop down and question everything.
mbx.attributes.emote.sit.title: Sit
mbx.attributes.emote.skull_aura.lore: You gathered all the legendary skulls. Now you float like a god, and smell like one too.
mbx.attributes.emote.skull_aura.title: Divine Aura
mbx.attributes.emote.slavic_dance.lore: Hardbass intensifies. Squat like babushka watching. Adidas sold separately.
mbx.attributes.emote.slavic_dance.title: Slav Squat Dance
mbx.attributes.emote.spinner.lore: Channel your inner Beyblade. Zero friction. Infinite style.
mbx.attributes.emote.spinner.title: Head Spinner
mbx.attributes.emote.tpose.lore: Assert dominance. Bugs fear it. Players respect it.
mbx.attributes.emote.tpose.title: T-Pose
mbx.attributes.emote.wave.lore: Friendly? Maybe. Mocking? Probably. You decide.
mbx.attributes.emote.wave.title: Wave
mbx.attributes.emote.zombie.lore: Braaaains… and terrible posture. Mondays, basically.
mbx.attributes.emote.zombie.title: Zombie Shuffle
mbx.attributes.nameplate.default.title: Default
mbx.attributes.nameplate.demonic_azure.l: Blue, edgy, and totally not overcompensating for something. Probably cursed. Definitely cringe.
mbx.attributes.nameplate.golden_devileye: See the truth, the lies, and your browser history. Burns brighter than your future.
mbx.attributes.nameplate.golden_flag.lor: Wave it with pride, or just to distract enemies. Spoiler: it doesn't work.
mbx.attributes.nameplate.golden_skull.lo: Looks expensive. Isn't. But hey, bling is bling.
mbx.attributes.nameplate.hammer.lore: Perfect for fixing nails, breaking bones, and solving arguments.
mbx.attributes.nameplate.hammer.title: Hammer of Subtlety
mbx.attributes.nameplate.heart.lore: Full of love, hope, and cholesterol. Handle with emotional gloves.
mbx.attributes.nameplate.heart.title: Heart
mbx.attributes.nameplate.map.lore: Leads to treasures, traps, or your ex's house. Mostly disappointment.
mbx.attributes.nameplate.map.title: Ancient Map
mbx.attributes.nameplate.name: Ornament
mbx.attributes.nameplate.skull.lore: Show off your loyalty with this hilarious ornament! A tiny skull hovers above your character. Spooky-cute!
mbx.attributes.nameplate.skull.title: Vote
mbx.attributes.nameplate.skull_upgrade.l: Now 15% more terrifying, 25% more useless, and 100% skull.
mbx.attributes.nameplate.sub.lore: You're the best supporter! This ornament proves it. Bragging rights included.
mbx.attributes.nameplate.sub.title: Sub
mbx.attributes.nameplate.sword.lore: Sharp pixels only. Looks cool, does nothing. Just like your PvP skills.
mbx.attributes.nameplate.sword.title: Sword Icon
mbx.attributes.nameplate.volcan.lore: Hot, furious, and likely to explode at family dinners.
mbx.attributes.nameplate.volcan.title: Volcanic Rage
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.evil.lore: Smiles like they set your spawn in lava. Wears black... and guilt. Builds lairs, not bases.
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.evil.title: Evil Plate
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.love.lore: Hearts everywhere. Boundaries nowhere. Sends signs with 'uwu' on them. Probably built a shrine. To you.
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.love.title: Love Plate
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.name: Profile plate
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.plant.lore: Grows on you. Like mold. Talks to crops. They talk back. Composts drama into status.
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.plant.title: Plant Plate
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.rainbow.lor: Subtle as a fireworks dispenser. Every color, no consistency. Style over substance. But lots of style.
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.royal.lore: Logs in like it's a coronation. Too noble to mine manually. Builds castles, judges huts.
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.royal.title: Royal Plate
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.sub.lore: Flashes your loyalty. Might be gifted, won't say. Flexes without spending.
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.sub.title: Sub Plate
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.temple.lore: Sacred? Maybe. Extra? Definitely. Thinks lighting candles adds XP. More decorative than useful. Like you.
mbx.attributes.profile_plate.tropical.lo: Too chill to tryhard. Plays barefoot, probably. Smells like sunscreen and ego.
mbx.attributes.tag.halloween_ghost.lore: Came back from the dead to spread happiness around or haunt you.
mbx.attributes.tag.halloween_ghost.title: sBOOky
mbx.attributes.tag.lny_snake.lore: Wise, elusive, and ever-watchful. You walk the path where patience meets fortune and cunning.
mbx.attributes.tag.lny_snake.title: Lunar Wood Snake
mbx.attributes.tag.name: Tag
mbx.attributes.tag.pack_alpha_basic.lore: Early to the party and still the life of it, you set sail before it was even a thing.
mbx.attributes.tag.retro_ticket.lore: For those who obtained the alpha ticket during the Christmas event on the founders' old server.
mbx.attributes.tag.retro_ticket.title: Alpha Ticket
mbx.attributes.tag.valentine.lore: Hopeless romantic or loot hunter? Either way, your heart's on your sleeve or at least in your tag.
mbx.attributes.tag.valentine.title: The Heartstruck
mbx.attributes.tag.xmas_hipster.lore: Celebrates Christmas ironically. Wore Santa hats before it was cool. Might still be doing it.
mbx.attributes.tag.xmas_hipster.title: The hipster
mbx.attributes.title.abyss_explorer.lore: Breathes pressure and madness, got lost for weeks underwater, still found loot somehow.
mbx.attributes.title.alpha_og.lore: Level 10 in alpha? You're an OG, no doubt about it.
mbx.attributes.title.alpha_og.title: Alpha OG
mbx.attributes.title.aspiring_adventurer: Still figuring out which end of the sword is the stabby one.
mbx.attributes.title.bamboo.lore: He breathes in chlorophyll, exhales pandas. The stick chose him.
mbx.attributes.title.bamboo.title: Bamboo God
mbx.attributes.title.beach_hero.lore: The shore salutes your courage, waves whisper your legend, and coconuts fear your name.
mbx.attributes.title.beach_hero.title: Beach Hero
mbx.attributes.title.beetroots.lore: Nobody eats them, but you farmed them. That's... something.
mbx.attributes.title.beetroots.title: Beetroot God
mbx.attributes.title.cactus.lore: Touched every spike, smiled through the pain. Definitely bleeding.
mbx.attributes.title.cactus.title: Cactus God
mbx.attributes.title.carrot.lore: Vision 20/20, social life 0/10. Heir to Bugs Bunny.
mbx.attributes.title.carrot.title: Carrot God
mbx.attributes.title.charmer.lore: Breaks hearts with a smile. May or may not return your texts.
mbx.attributes.title.charmer.title: Charmer
mbx.attributes.title.cocoa_beans.lore: Built a chocolate empire, forgot to log out. Sweet darkness.
mbx.attributes.title.cocoa_beans.title: Cocoa God
mbx.attributes.title.cool_pirate.lore: You're a cool pirate, a very cool pirate. Certified.
mbx.attributes.title.cool_pirate.title: Cool pirate
mbx.attributes.title.crazy_voter.lore: Clicks faster than their shadow, a true maniac with a vote button. Keyboard may need therapy.
mbx.attributes.title.crazy_voter.title: Crazy voter
mbx.attributes.title.crowned_head.lore: Wears a crown, does nothing, sits while others quest, gets the credit anyway.
mbx.attributes.title.crowned_head.title: Crowned Head
mbx.attributes.title.curious_collector.l: You've started your journey, discovering hidden treasures, one curiosity at a time.
mbx.attributes.title.day_zero_hero.lore: Level 25 in alpha? You were winning before anyone else.
mbx.attributes.title.day_zero_hero.title: Day Zero Hero
mbx.attributes.title.ghostbuster.lore: If there is something strange in your neighbourhood, who you gonna call?
mbx.attributes.title.ghostbuster.title: Ghostbuster
mbx.attributes.title.kelp.lore: Lives underwater now. Speaks to algae. Has gills. Probably.
mbx.attributes.title.kelp.title: Kelp God
mbx.attributes.title.legend.lore: You've collected every skull, proof of absolute dominance, the pinnacle of power.
mbx.attributes.title.legend.title: LEGEND
mbx.attributes.title.legend_of_the_sea.l: You braved the seas, fought fish, and probably got really wet. True sea legend. Maybe.
mbx.attributes.title.lny_snake.lore: Cunning, wise, and ever-patient— this celestial serpent slithers between fate and fortune.
mbx.attributes.title.lny_snake.title: The Snake
mbx.attributes.title.master_of_evil.lore: Negotiates with demons, burns bridges for fun, smiles during world endings.
mbx.attributes.title.mega_brain.lore: Misclicked into victory, overthinks level 5 mobs, outsmarts himself daily.
mbx.attributes.title.mega_brain.title: Mega Brain
mbx.attributes.title.melon.lore: Split over 10,000. Seeds in his blood. Juice in his soul.
mbx.attributes.title.melon.title: Melon God
mbx.attributes.title.minebox_addict.lore: Votes so often they're basically part of the Minebox server code. Patch notes not included.
mbx.attributes.title.mushroom.lore: Farms both types. One edible, one illegal. Who's asking?
mbx.attributes.title.mushroom.title: Mushroom God
mbx.attributes.title.name: Title
mbx.attributes.title.nether_wart.lore: Forgot what daylight is. Sells weird potions. Highly suspicious.
mbx.attributes.title.nether_wart.title: Wart God
mbx.attributes.title.newbie.lore: Thinks armor is cosmetic, asks what DPS means, still rolls Need on everything.
mbx.attributes.title.newbie.title: Newbie
mbx.attributes.title.no_life.lore: Hasn't seen sunlight since the tutorial island. Respawns in his chair.
mbx.attributes.title.no_life.title: No-Life
mbx.attributes.title.no_shower_needed.lo: Hygiene is optional when you're grinding this hard. Touch grass? Never heard of it.
mbx.attributes.title.pack_alpha_basic.lo: Early to the party and still the life of it. True pioneer in digital waters.
mbx.attributes.title.potatoes.lore: Chose the humble spud, became legend. All hail the starch.
mbx.attributes.title.potatoes.title: Potato God
mbx.attributes.title.pro_player.lore: Misses every ability, blames the lag, streams to 2 viewers anyway.
mbx.attributes.title.pro_player.title: Pro Player
mbx.attributes.title.puddle_addict.lore: Can't resist a good splash. Some say they see puddles where there are none.
mbx.attributes.title.puddle_addict.title: Puddle addict
mbx.attributes.title.puddle_genius.lore: Invented three new ways to step in puddles. Revolutionary, really.
mbx.attributes.title.puddle_genius.title: Puddle genius
mbx.attributes.title.puddle_god.lore: Controls all puddles, from small splashes to legendary lakes.
mbx.attributes.title.puddle_god.title: The Puddle God
mbx.attributes.title.puddle_master.lore: Knows every puddle by name. A true connoisseur of wet terrain.
mbx.attributes.title.puddle_master.title: Puddle master
mbx.attributes.title.pumpkin.lore: Pumpkin is love. Pumpkin is life. Pumpkin is watching.
mbx.attributes.title.pumpkin.title: Pumpkin God
mbx.attributes.title.retro_ticket.lore: Before it was cool, you were already here. Certified hipster.
mbx.attributes.title.retro_ticket.title: I was here before
mbx.attributes.title.single.lore: Alone, but thriving. And honestly, kind of loving it.
mbx.attributes.title.single.title: Single
mbx.attributes.title.smelly.lore: You've been online so long that even your character needs deodorant.
mbx.attributes.title.smelly.title: Smelly
mbx.attributes.title.sugar_cane.lore: Built a wall of sugar. Dentists fear him. Insulin cries.
mbx.attributes.title.sugar_cane.title: Cane God
mbx.attributes.title.sweet_berries.lore: Harvests pain. Eats the profits. Ouch. Again.
mbx.attributes.title.sweet_berries.title: Berry God
mbx.attributes.title.the_brawler.lore: Solves everything with fists, strategy not included, asks where the healer went after wiping.
mbx.attributes.title.the_brawler.title: The Brawler
mbx.attributes.title.the_ceo.lore: You've invested in every business, built a fortune, and now you're the boss.
mbx.attributes.title.the_ceo.title: The CEO
mbx.attributes.title.the_collector.lore: You've conquered every challenge, gathered every piece, the ultimate master of collections.
mbx.attributes.title.the_collector.title: THE COLLECTOR
mbx.attributes.title.the_dps.lore: Refuses to block, refuses to heal, top damage tho.
mbx.attributes.title.the_dps.title: The DPS
mbx.attributes.title.the_encyclopedist.l: Knowledge surrounds you, pages turn with secrets, you are a living library.
mbx.attributes.title.the_machine.lore: Human or bot? We'll never know. But those votes keep rolling in. Suspiciously efficient.
mbx.attributes.title.the_machine.title: The machine
mbx.attributes.title.touched_grass_never: 48 hours straight. Sleep is for the weak. You are the server now.
mbx.attributes.title.wheat.lore: Walks through golden fields, like some weird cereal prophet. Preaches gluten.
mbx.attributes.title.wheat.title: Wheat God
mbx.attributes.title.xmas_hipster.lore: Celebrates Christmas ironically. Wore Santa hats before it was cool. Probably owns vinyl too.
mbx.attributes.title.xmas_hipster.title: The hipster
mbx.items.adventurer_backpack.lore: Fits potions, swords, and unresolved trauma. No weight limit. Apparently.
mbx.items.adventurer_backpack.name: Adventurer Backpack
mbx.items.adventurer_helmet.lore: Protects your head from rocks, rain, and regret. Mostly regret.
mbx.items.adventurer_helmet.name: Adventurer Helmet
mbx.items.adventurer_sword.lore: Sharp enough to cut grass. And confidence. Legend says it once poked a dragon.
mbx.items.adventurer_sword.name: Adventurer Sword
mbx.items.afk_boost_epic.description: Boosts crystal gains x3 while AFK. Consume to activate the effect.
mbx.items.afk_boost_epic.lore: They said 'work smarter, not harder.' So you logged in, sat down, and let the crystals come to you.
mbx.items.afk_boost_epic.name: Crystal Catalyst
mbx.items.afk_boost_legendary.descriptio: Boosts crystal gains x4 while AFK. Consume to activate the effect.
mbx.items.afk_boost_legendary.lore: Legend says whoever eats this ascends to a higher plane of laziness. Productivity was never an option.
mbx.items.afk_boost_legendary.name: Crystal Catalyst
mbx.items.afk_boost_rare.description: Boosts crystal gains x2 while AFK. Consume to activate the effect.
mbx.items.afk_boost_rare.lore: Finally, a valid excuse to do absolutely nothing. Laziness has never been so profitable.
mbx.items.afk_boost_rare.name: Crystal Catalyst
mbx.items.alchemists_essence.lore: Distilled from the finest elements, this essence is a true alchemist's delight.
mbx.items.alchemists_essence.name: Alchemist's Essence
mbx.items.alien_backpack.lore: Carries the truly unknown, hums softly and glows softer, probes when nobody is watching.
mbx.items.alien_backpack.name: Beep-Boop Backpack
mbx.items.alligator_scale.name: Alligator scale
mbx.items.ancient_bandage.lore: Dusty, crunchy, and definitely not sterile. Might fix your wounds, or add new ones.
mbx.items.ancient_bandage.name: Ancient Bandage
mbx.items.ancient_herb_extract.lore: From ancient times, this extract holds secrets of the old herbal masters.
mbx.items.ancient_herb_extract.name: Ancient Herb Extract
mbx.items.angel_backpack.lore: Feather-light and majestic, they make you look holy, but won't save you from falling.
mbx.items.angel_backpack.name: Heavenly Wings
mbx.items.angel_helmet.lore: Glows softly above your head, makes you look innocent, even if you're absolutely not.
mbx.items.angel_helmet.name: Heavenly Halo
mbx.items.annoying_buzz_essence.lore: Captured the sound of constant buzzing. Guaranteed to drive you mad.
mbx.items.annoying_buzz_essence.name: Annoying Buzz Essence
mbx.items.ashstone_shard.lore: A tiny piece of volcanic fury, perfect for spicing up your life.
mbx.items.ashstone_shard.name: Ashstone Shard
mbx.items.aspen_carving_block.lore: Softwood for sculptors, easy to shape, ideal for intricate designs.
mbx.items.aspen_carving_block.name: Aspen Carving Block
mbx.items.astral_back.lore: Orbit into style with this planetary backpiece. Gravity? Never heard of it!
mbx.items.astral_back.name: Astral Back
mbx.items.astral_boots.lore: Step into the void with confidence. These boots are made for spacewalking.
mbx.items.astral_boots.name: Astral Boots
mbx.items.astral_chestplate.lore: Feel like a walking galaxy. Armored for battle and fashionably celestial.
mbx.items.astral_chestplate.name: Astral Chestplate
mbx.items.astral_helmet.lore: Protect your noggin while channeling the power of the cosmos. Star-studded!
mbx.items.astral_helmet.name: Astral Helmet
mbx.items.astral_leggings.lore: Strut through the stars with these leggings. Stylish, comfy, and out of this world.
mbx.items.astral_leggings.name: Astral Leggings
mbx.items.avocado.lore: Perfect for a toast, green and creamy, or a secret potion!
mbx.items.avocado.name: Avocado
mbx.items.avocado_toast.lore: When bread and avocados fall in love, this hipster legend is born.
mbx.items.avocado_toast.name: Avocado Toast
mbx.items.babyshark_belt.lore: Worn by the fiercest of tiny predators, this belt makes you feel unstoppable.
mbx.items.babyshark_belt.name: Babyshark Belt
mbx.items.babyshark_boots.lore: Shark-like speed, these boots make you move like a predator.
mbx.items.babyshark_boots.name: Baby Shark Boots
mbx.items.babyshark_chestplate.lore: Armor of the deep, tough and sleek, a predator's choice.
mbx.items.babyshark_chestplate.name: Baby Shark Chestplate
mbx.items.babyshark_helmet.lore: Doo doo doo doo doo doo! This helmet is as cute as it is fierce.
mbx.items.babyshark_helmet.name: Baby Shark Helmet
mbx.items.babyshark_leggings.lore: Leggings of the sea, swift and agile, like a shark's glide.
mbx.items.babyshark_leggings.name: Baby Shark Leggings
mbx.items.babyshark_ring.lore: Tiny but mighty, this ring embodies the spirit of a fierce baby shark.
mbx.items.babyshark_ring.name: Babyshark Ring
mbx.items.babyshark_sword.lore: Bite of a shark, sharp and deadly, a fearsome weapon.
mbx.items.babyshark_sword.name: Baby Shark Sword
mbx.items.backwards_hat.lore: Worn the wrong way on purpose, definitely on purpose, grants instant street cred.
mbx.items.backwards_hat.name: Backflip Cap
mbx.items.bag_of_dried_bananas.lore: For when you're hungry and hate potassium. Crunchy disappointment in every bite.
mbx.items.bag_of_dried_bananas.name: Bag of Dried Bananas
mbx.items.baguette.lore: A formidable weapon, or just a tasty snack, your choice!
mbx.items.baguette.name: Baguette
mbx.items.baking_board.lore: A must-have for bakers, smooth surface for dough, durable and sturdy.
mbx.items.baking_board.name: Baking Board
mbx.items.baking_powder.lore: For fluffy cakes, or unexpected explosions, you decide!
mbx.items.baking_powder.name: Baking powder
mbx.items.balloon.description: Balloons are cosmetics that decorate your head. Manage them with /cosmetics.
mbx.items.balloon.name: Balloon
mbx.items.balloon_ice_cream.lore: Floats like a dream, melts in the sun, don't let go or cry!
mbx.items.balloon_ice_cream.name: Ice Cream Balloon
mbx.items.balloon_swirl_ice_cream.lore: Hypnotic swirls, mesmerizing patterns, you're now distracted forever!
mbx.items.balloon_swirl_ice_cream.name: Swirl Ice Cream Balloon
mbx.items.bamboo_belly_wrap.lore: Perfect for hiding that extra snack, or ten.
mbx.items.bamboo_belly_wrap.name: Bamboo Belly Wrap
mbx.items.bamboo_sock.lore: Guaranteed to keep your feet fresh, or just really itchy.
mbx.items.bamboo_sock.name: Bamboo Sock
mbx.items.banana.lore: Perfect for slipping foes, a tasty trap waiting to ruin someone's day!
mbx.items.banana.name: Banana
mbx.items.banana_boots.lore: Slip into speed, with these fruity boots, run with style.
mbx.items.banana_boots.name: Banana Boots
mbx.items.banana_bread.lore: The only loaf that bananas dream of being when they grow up.
mbx.items.banana_bread.name: Banana Bread
mbx.items.banana_candy.lore: Peeled from the land of sweets, this candy is so delicious, monkeys beg for mercy.
mbx.items.banana_candy.name: Banana Candy
mbx.items.banana_chestplate.lore: Tough as peel, protects your core, a fruity defense.
mbx.items.banana_chestplate.name: Banana Chestplate
mbx.items.banana_engraved_skull.lore: A small skull, engraved with a banana. Tasty or terrifying?
mbx.items.banana_engraved_skull.name: Banana-Engraved Skull
mbx.items.banana_hat.lore: Slip once and you regret it slip twice and the floor wins slip thrice and friends film it.
mbx.items.banana_hat.name: Peelcap
mbx.items.banana_helmet.lore: Head protection, with a fruity twist, banana tough.
mbx.items.banana_helmet.name: Banana Helmet
mbx.items.banana_leggings.lore: Flexible and strong, these leggings offer banana-powered speed.
mbx.items.banana_leggings.name: Banana Leggings
mbx.items.banana_milkshake.lore: Shake it up with this creamy banana delight, blender-approved chaos.

mbx.items.bow_arrowplane.name: Arrowplane

mbx.items.bow_guffaw_gauntlet.name: Guffaw Gauntlet

mbx.items.bow_rainbow.name: Rainbow

mbx.items.bow_string_cheese.name: String Cheese

mbx.items.bow_suction_shooter.name: Suction Shooter
mbx.items.bow_tickle_shot.lore: Feathers and defeat. Ticklish ending guaranteed. Laugh to your last breath.
mbx.items.bow_tickle_shot.name: Tickle Shot
mbx.items.bowl_of_cheese.lore: An avalanche of cheese, so intense, mice start forming climbing teams.
mbx.items.bowl_of_cheese.name: Bowl of Cheese

mbx.items.box_hat.name: Prime Lid

mbx.items.breadboard.name: Breadboard

mbx.items.breaded_fish_sticks.name: Breaded Fish Sticks

mbx.items.broken_chain.name: Broken Chain

mbx.items.broken_compass.name: Broken Compass
mbx.items.broken_nunchaku_fragment.lore: Snapped in half, but still a little cool. Not as effective in a fight though.
mbx.items.broken_nunchaku_fragment.name: Broken Nunchaku Fragment

mbx.items.brown_insect_powder.name: Brown Insect Powder

mbx.items.bucket_water_royal.lore: Fit for a king's garden, this bucket waters with regal grace.
mbx.items.bucket_water_royal.name: Royal Water Bucket
mbx.items.bucket_water_simple.lore: A plain but reliable bucket for all your watering needs.
mbx.items.bucket_water_simple.name: Simple Water Bucket

mbx.items.bug_net.name: Bug Net

mbx.items.butter.name: Butter

mbx.items.butterfly_night.name: Night Butterfly

mbx.items.cactus_backpack.name: Cactus Backpack

mbx.items.cactus_boots.name: Cactus Boots

mbx.items.cactus_chestplate.name: Cactus Chestplate
mbx.items.cactus_helmet.lore: Protect your head, with desert durability, spiky defense.
mbx.items.cactus_helmet.name: Cactus Helmet
mbx.items.cactus_juice.lore: Refreshing with a hint of danger. Mind the tiny spikes.
mbx.items.cactus_juice.name: Cactus Juice
mbx.items.cactus_leggings.lore: Desert protection, for agile movement, with spiky resilience.
mbx.items.cactus_leggings.name: Cactus Leggings
mbx.items.cactus_necklace.lore: Prickly charm that adds a touch of desert magic, soft but strong.
mbx.items.cactus_necklace.name: Cactus Necklace
mbx.items.cactus_ring.lore: Prickly yet charming, this ring embodies desert magic, soft but strong.
mbx.items.cactus_ring.name: Cactus Ring
mbx.items.cactus_sword.lore: Blade of the desert, sharp and tough, a prickly weapon.
mbx.items.cactus_sword.name: Cactus Sword
mbx.items.california_roll_wrapper.lore: Slightly soggy, doesn't roll well. At least it smells like sushi.
mbx.items.california_roll_wrapper.name: California Roll Wrapper
mbx.items.candies_big.description: A large candy that gives a big boost to your {{key0}} stat.
mbx.items.candies_big.name: Big {{key0}} Candy
mbx.items.candies_enchanted.description: A magical candy that boosts your {{key0}} stat with an enchanted touch.
mbx.items.candies_enchanted.name: Enchanted {{key0}} Candy
mbx.items.candle_boots.lore: Brighten your path keep your toes warm avoid wax puddles.
mbx.items.candle_boots.name: Candle Boots
mbx.items.candle_chestplate.lore: Glow in the dark but don't stay too close to the fire!
mbx.items.candle_chestplate.name: Candle Chestplate
mbx.items.candle_helmet.lore: Light your way be careful with the wax no hair on fire!
mbx.items.candle_helmet.name: Candle Helmet
mbx.items.candle_leggings.lore: Run with style keep your legs lit just don't melt.
mbx.items.candle_leggings.name: Candle Leggings
mbx.items.candle_necklace.lore: Wear the light around your neck stay bright and warm.
mbx.items.candle_necklace.name: Candle Necklace
mbx.items.candle_ring.lore: A glowing band for your finger shine on!
mbx.items.candle_ring.name: Candle Ring
mbx.items.candle_sword.lore: Illuminates the darkest paths, but wield too slowly and it might melt.
mbx.items.candle_sword.name: Candle Sword
mbx.items.candy_crafting_speed.lore: For the crafters who can't wait, this candy makes time your friend.
mbx.items.candy_crafting_speed.name: Crafting Speed Candy
mbx.items.candy_enchanted_crafting_speed: Now with extra sparkles. Craft faster than your brain can follow. Ends in disaster or glory.
mbx.items.candy_enchanted_fly.lore: Take to the skies with wings of candy, soar higher than dreams.
mbx.items.candy_enchanted_fly.name: Enchanted Fly Candy
mbx.items.candy_fly.lore: Take to the skies with wings of candy, soar higher than dreams.
mbx.items.candy_fly.name: Fly Candy
mbx.items.candy_herb.lore: Contains a secret blend of herbs... Definitely... totally... legal... Not for snitches.
mbx.items.candy_herb.name: Herbal Candy
mbx.items.cannon_1.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's firepower.
mbx.items.cannon_1.lore: It shoots cannonballs, not compliments. Though both can be equally devastating at close range.
mbx.items.cannon_1.name: Iron Cannon
mbx.items.cannon_2.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's firepower.
mbx.items.cannon_2.lore: Polished so bright, enemies surrender just from the glare. Fashion meets destruction.
mbx.items.cannon_2.name: Bronze Cannon
mbx.items.cannon_3.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's firepower.
mbx.items.cannon_3.lore: Why shoot lead when you can shoot gold? Terrible economics, but incredible style points.
mbx.items.cannon_3.name: Golden Cannon
mbx.items.cannon_4.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's firepower.
mbx.items.cannon_4.lore: Forged in the abyss by a blacksmith who clearly had anger issues. Every shot echoes with pure rage.
mbx.items.cannon_4.name: Obsidian Cannon
mbx.items.carving_board.lore: Ready for culinary arts, sharp and precise, a chef's best friend.
mbx.items.carving_board.name: Carving Board
mbx.items.cash_register_backpack.lore: Cha-ching follows you around with receipts spilling from every seam and somehow you still owe us.
mbx.items.cash_register_backpack.name: Cha-Ching Backpack
mbx.items.chamomile_herbal_tea.lore: Relax and unwind with this soothing chamomile herbal brew.
mbx.items.chamomile_herbal_tea.name: Chamomile Herbal Tea
mbx.items.cheddar_axe.description: An axe that smells like victory. And cheese. Mostly cheese.
mbx.items.cheddar_axe.lore: Chop wood, chop cheese, chop whatever you want, it's all the same to cheddar!
mbx.items.cheddar_axe.name: Cheddar Axe
mbx.items.cheddar_boots.description: Walk the path of dairy dominance. Slippery when wet.
mbx.items.cheddar_boots.lore: Step into greatness, or at least into cheese, leaves yellow footprints!
mbx.items.cheddar_boots.name: Cheddar Boots
mbx.items.cheddar_cheese.lore: A classic so sharp, it cuts through the competition.
mbx.items.cheddar_cheese.name: Cheddar Cheese
mbx.items.cheddar_chestplate.description: Maximum protection with maximum smell. Mice not included.
mbx.items.cheddar_chestplate.lore: Thick layers of cheddar, absorbs damage and stares, you're a walking cheese board!
mbx.items.cheddar_chestplate.name: Cheddar Chestplate
mbx.items.cheddar_helmet.description: Aged to perfection, unlike your skills. Provides decent defense and strong aroma.
mbx.items.cheddar_helmet.lore: Sharp cheddar protection, smells like victory, or just cheese, honestly.
mbx.items.cheddar_helmet.name: Cheddar Helmet
mbx.items.cheddar_hoe.description: For the sophisticated cheese farmer. Grows wisdom with every crop.
mbx.items.cheddar_hoe.lore: Farm the cheese fields, plant dairy dreams, harvest confusion!
mbx.items.cheddar_hoe.name: Cheddar Hoe
mbx.items.cheddar_leggings.description: Move with the grace of melting cheese. Surprisingly comfortable.
mbx.items.cheddar_leggings.lore: Flexible yet firm, like aged cheddar should be, leg day just got cheesy!
mbx.items.cheddar_leggings.name: Cheddar Leggings
mbx.items.cheddar_pickaxe.description: Dig deep into the dairy mines. Fortune favors the cheesy miner.
mbx.items.cheddar_pickaxe.lore: Mine for cheese ore, or regular ore, everything tastes better with cheddar!
mbx.items.cheddar_pickaxe.name: Cheddar Pickaxe
mbx.items.cheddar_shield.description: Solid cheddar defense. Blocks damage and common sense.
mbx.items.cheddar_shield.lore: Block attacks with dairy, confuse your enemies, they'll wonder if you're serious!
mbx.items.cheddar_shield.name: Cheddar Shield
mbx.items.cheddar_shovel.description: Shovel with a hint of cheddar. Makes digging delicious.
mbx.items.cheddar_shovel.lore: Dig holes, bury cheese, or your shame, versatile tool for all occasions!
mbx.items.cheddar_shovel.name: Cheddar Shovel
mbx.items.cheddar_sword.description: A blade forged from pure cheddar. Surprisingly effective in combat.
mbx.items.cheddar_sword.lore: Sharp as aged cheddar, cuts through enemies, and makes great sandwiches!
mbx.items.cheddar_sword.name: Cheddar Sword
mbx.items.cheese_axe.description: An axe worthy of cheese legends. Critical hits taste better.
mbx.items.cheese_axe.lore: Chops with cheese authority, trees fall in confusion, you rise in dairy power!
mbx.items.cheese_axe.name: Cheese Axe
mbx.items.cheese_boots.description: Every step is a culinary experience. Fortune favors the cheesy.
mbx.items.cheese_boots.lore: Walk on clouds of cheese, or just regular ground, but with more style!
mbx.items.cheese_boots.name: Cheese Boots
mbx.items.cheese_cake.lore: Creamy, dreamy, and so cheesy that even mice are jealous.
mbx.items.cheese_cake.name: Cheese Cake
mbx.items.cheese_chestplate.description: Crafted from the rarest cheeses. Your chest never felt so gourmet.
mbx.items.cheese_chestplate.lore: Legendary cheese armor, so powerful, so smelly, enemies flee from the aroma!
mbx.items.cheese_chestplate.name: Cheese Chestplate
mbx.items.cheese_helmet.description: The finest cheese craftsmanship. Wisdom flows like fondue.
mbx.items.cheese_helmet.lore: Premium aged cheese, protects your thoughts, and attracts all the rats!
mbx.items.cheese_helmet.name: Cheese Helmet
mbx.items.cheese_hoe.description: For the ultimate cheese farmer. Every harvest is a masterpiece.
mbx.items.cheese_hoe.lore: Cultivate cheese gardens, grow dairy wisdom, harvest legendary crops!
mbx.items.cheese_hoe.name: Cheese Hoe
mbx.items.cheese_leggings.description: Legendary leg protection with a hint of sophistication.
mbx.items.cheese_leggings.lore: Stretchy like mozzarella, strong like parmesan, you're basically a cheese platter!
mbx.items.cheese_leggings.name: Cheese Leggings
mbx.items.cheese_pickaxe.description: Legendary mining tool of cheese. Fortune and wisdom combined.
mbx.items.cheese_pickaxe.lore: Mine the rarest cheese veins, discover dairy treasures, become the cheese tycoon!
mbx.items.cheese_pickaxe.name: Cheese Pickaxe
mbx.items.cheese_reset.description: This cheese causes memory loss, but also resets your stats.
mbx.items.cheese_reset.name: Strong cheese
mbx.items.cheese_shield.description: Legendary cheese protection. Wisdom and defense in perfect harmony.
mbx.items.cheese_shield.lore: Impenetrable cheese wall, blocks everything, including your social life!
mbx.items.cheese_shield.name: Cheese Shield
mbx.items.cheese_shovel.description: The shovel of cheese masters. Fast, fortunate, and fabulous.
mbx.items.cheese_shovel.lore: Dig with cheese precision, unearth dairy secrets, bury your enemies in fondue!
mbx.items.cheese_shovel.name: Cheese Shovel
mbx.items.cheese_sword.description: The ultimate cheese weapon. Cuts through anything except logic.
mbx.items.cheese_sword.lore: Legendary blade of cheese, feared by lactose intolerant, revered by dairy lovers!
mbx.items.cheese_sword.name: Cheese Sword
mbx.items.cherry_ice_cream_hat.lore: Sweet cherry on top, melting slowly on your head, sticky situation incoming!
mbx.items.cherry_ice_cream_hat.name: Cherry Ice Cream Hat
mbx.items.chestnut.lore: A taste of autumn, warm and cozy, roasted to perfection.
mbx.items.chestnut.name: Chestnut
mbx.items.chestnut_nut_butter.lore: Smooth and creamy, a delightful spread, perfect on toast.
mbx.items.chestnut_nut_butter.name: Chestnut Nut Butter
mbx.items.chicken_sandwich.lore: Feather-light yet filling, this sandwich knows how to wing it.
mbx.items.chicken_sandwich.name: Chicken Sandwich
mbx.items.chipped_fang.lore: Ripped from a creature. It was not happy about it. Neither was the dentist.
mbx.items.chipped_fang.name: Chipped Fang
mbx.items.chocolate_cake.lore: Decadence in every bite, this cake could turn a saint into a sinner.
mbx.items.chocolate_cake.name: Chocolate Cake
mbx.items.chopper.name: {{key0}} Chopper
mbx.items.class_archer.description: Ranged bowman with precise shots, javelins and dragon-powered arrows.  Passive: Hunter's Focus. Hitting targets builds focus stacks that enhance your attacks.
mbx.items.class_archer.lore: A keen eye and steady hand, raining arrows upon foes from a safe distance.
mbx.items.class_archer.name: Archer
mbx.items.class_archmage.description: Master of arcane arts wielding devastating magic, meteors and void chains.  Passive: Arcane Shield. Layered shields that absorb hits and reform after a short delay.
mbx.items.class_archmage.lore: Supreme sorcerer bending reality itself, unleashing cataclysmic arcane power.
mbx.items.class_archmage.name: Archmage
mbx.items.class_arctic_knight.descriptio: Frost warrior wielding frigid lances, ice shields and glacial smashes.  Passive: Frostbite. Your skills have a 20% chance to apply damage over time.
mbx.items.class_arctic_knight.lore: An icy champion of the frozen wastes, freezing foes with permafrost strikes.
mbx.items.class_arctic_knight.name: Arctic Knight
mbx.items.class_artificer.description: Arcane engineer wielding blasters, turrets, flamethrowers and a devastating mecha suit.  Passive: Magical Tinkering. Auto gain max shield when not full after cooldown.
mbx.items.class_artificer.lore: Master inventor fusing arcane magic with mechanical ingenuity, raining fire from above.
mbx.items.class_artificer.name: Artificer
mbx.items.class_assassin.description: Stealthy melee fighter with fast slashes, dashes, daggers and shadow abilities.  Passive: Assassin's Blade. Your attacks have a 15% chance to make the target bleed.
mbx.items.class_assassin.lore: A shadow in the dark, striking swiftly and vanishing before the blade is seen.
mbx.items.class_assassin.name: Assassin
mbx.items.class_awakened_archer.descript: Ranged archer with combo shots, volleys and piercing skills.  Passive: Ambush aura. First hit on marked targets deals bonus damage.
mbx.items.class_awakened_archer.lore: Swift bow and deadly aim, striking from the shadows with explosive arrows.
mbx.items.class_awakened_archer.name: Archer
mbx.items.class_awakened_assassin.descri: An evolved assassin wielding dusk-infused blades. Combines lethal combos, shadow dashes, and devastating finishers.  Passive: Deadly Calm. Standing still grants Calm Focus for 2x crit damage on next skill.
mbx.items.class_awakened_assassin.lore: Darkness sharpened to a blade, silence forged into fury, the final dance begins.
mbx.items.class_awakened_assassin.name: Awakened Assassin
mbx.items.class_awakened_mage.descriptio: An ascended mage channeling fire, ice, and thunder sorcery. Combines devastating AoE spells with elemental combos.  Passive: Mana Barrier. A magic shield regenerates periodically, absorbing one incoming attack.
mbx.items.class_awakened_mage.lore: Three elements converge, arcane fury made manifest, the storm answers.
mbx.items.class_awakened_mage.name: Awakened Mage
mbx.items.class_awakened_shaman.descript: A dual-stance spiritual warrior channeling thunder and earth. Thunder Stance unleashes bolts and strikes. Earth Stance heals and shields allies.  Passive: Soul Link. Spiritually bond with the nearest ally, granting strength or healing.
mbx.items.class_awakened_shaman.lore: Two spirits intertwined, thunder roars, earth mends, balance restored.
mbx.items.class_awakened_shaman.name: Awakened Shaman
mbx.items.class_awakened_summoner.descri: A master of soul magic who commands minions in battle. Summon wolves, dragons, and warriors to fight for you.  Passive: Spirit Wolf. A loyal wolf companion fights by your side with claws and bites.
mbx.items.class_awakened_summoner.lore: Souls bound to service, an army rises from nothing, the summoner commands.
mbx.items.class_awakened_summoner.name: Awakened Summoner
mbx.items.class_awakened_warrior.descrip: A berserking warrior who channels raw fury into devastating melee combos and unstoppable strikes.  Passive: Bulwark Instinct. Getting hit gives you Resistance 3 for 5 seconds.
mbx.items.class_awakened_warrior.lore: Fury forged in blood, the blade carves its path, through ruin and rage.
mbx.items.class_awakened_warrior.name: Awakened Warrior
mbx.items.class_barbarian.description: A savage warrior fueled by primal rage, wielding axes with reckless abandon.  Passive: Bloodlust. Striking enemies has a 5% chance to heal yourself.
mbx.items.class_barbarian.lore: Rage runs deep in bone, the axe falls without mercy, no foe left standing.
mbx.items.class_barbarian.name: Barbarian
mbx.items.class_bard.description: A musical enchanter who wields sound and melody as weapons and support.  Passive: Shield of Harmony. Musical notes apply resistance to you and nearby allies.
mbx.items.class_bard.lore: Strings hum with power, the melody shapes the world, harmony or ruin.
mbx.items.class_bard.name: Bard
mbx.items.class_beastmaster.description: A crossbow-wielding hunter who summons and commands beasts. Ride a panther, owl, or turtle, each with unique auras.  Passive: Beast Aura. Gain buffs depending on your summoned beast and they fight alongside you.
mbx.items.class_beastmaster.lore: Fang and claw obey, the wild bends to a master's unbreakable bond.
mbx.items.class_beastmaster.name: Beastmaster
mbx.items.class_bloodmoon_vampire.descri: A dark warrior who shapes blood into weapons. Switch between Blades, Grimoire, Needles, and Scythe forms, each with unique combos and surge attacks.
mbx.items.class_bloodmoon_vampire.lore: Blood bends to will, four forms of crimson fury, night's eternal gift.
mbx.items.class_bloodmoon_vampire.name: Bloodmoon Vampire
mbx.items.class_cleric.description: A holy warrior wielding divine power through mace and prayer. Heals allies and smites foes with sacred light.  Passive: Dawnbringer Angel. Summons an angel that heals you periodically.  Passive: Tears of God. Holy tears fall around you, healing nearby allies.
mbx.items.class_cleric.lore: Light shields the faithful, mace and prayer strike as one, heaven's chosen stand.
mbx.items.class_cleric.name: Cleric
mbx.items.class_crusader.description: A frontline guardian who shields allies, controls space, and can retaliate with holy force.
mbx.items.class_crusader.lore: Shield raised, banner unbroken, he stands between light and ruin, then answers with judgment.
mbx.items.class_crusader.name: Crusader
mbx.items.class_death_knight.description: A powerful death knight class with unique abilities and devastating combat skills.  Passive: Cursed Seal. Activates automatically during combat.  Passive: Soul Barrier. Activates automatically during combat.
mbx.items.class_death_knight.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_death_knight.name: Death Knight
mbx.items.class_dragon_warrior.descripti: A powerful dragon warrior class with unique abilities and devastating combat skills.  Passive: Dragon Skin. Activates automatically during combat.
mbx.items.class_dragon_warrior.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_dragon_warrior.name: Dragon Warrior
mbx.items.class_druid.description: A powerful druid class with unique abilities and devastating combat skills.  Passive: Healing Wisps. Activates automatically during combat.
mbx.items.class_druid.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_druid.name: Druid

mbx.items.class_elementalist.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_elementalist.name: Elementalist

mbx.items.class_gale_glaive.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_gale_glaive.name: Gale Glaive

mbx.items.class_gunner.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_gunner.name: Gunner

mbx.items.class_heroes_beast_slayer.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_heroes_beast_slayer.name: Heroes Beast Slayer

mbx.items.class_heroes_flame_warrior.lor: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.

mbx.items.class_heroes_thunder_ronin.lor: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.

mbx.items.class_heroes_water_samurai.lor: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.

mbx.items.class_illusionist.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_illusionist.name: Illusionist

mbx.items.class_mage.name: Mage

mbx.items.class_martial_artist.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_martial_artist.name: Martial Artist
mbx.items.class_monk.description: A powerful monk class with unique abilities and devastating combat skills.  Passive: Beads Of Karma. Activates automatically during combat.
mbx.items.class_monk.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_monk.name: Monk
mbx.items.class_necromancer.description: Ranged magic summoner that uses minions and ranged skills to defeat enemies from afar.  Passive: You instantly heal 20 when your health drops below 3.
mbx.items.class_necromancer.lore: Master of death and flame, commanding minions and draining the life of foes.
mbx.items.class_necromancer.name: Necromancer
mbx.items.class_ninja_samurai.descriptio: A powerful ninja samurai class with unique abilities and devastating combat skills.  Passive: Flow State. Activates automatically during combat.  Passive: Flow State Remove. Activates automatically during combat.  Passive: Death Charge. Activates automatically during combat.
mbx.items.class_ninja_samurai.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_ninja_samurai.name: Ninja Samurai
mbx.items.class_paladin.description: Holy warrior with radiant auras, divine strikes and protective shields.  Passive: Each skill cast adds a holy ring. Every 4th stack heals and gives resistance to you and allies.
mbx.items.class_paladin.lore: A knight in shining armor, ready to defend the innocent, and smite the wicked.
mbx.items.class_paladin.name: Paladin
mbx.items.class_phoenix_hunter.descripti: A powerful phoenix hunter class with unique abilities and devastating combat skills.  Passive: Flameborn. Activates automatically during combat.  Passive: Phoenix Totem. Activates automatically during combat.

mbx.items.class_phoenix_hunter.name: Phoenix Hunter

mbx.items.class_reaper.name: Reaper

Passive: Dark Monarch Frighten. Activates automatically during combat.  Passive: Blades Of Shadow. Activates automatically during combat.
mbx.items.class_shadowmancer.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_shadowmancer.name: Shadowmancer
mbx.items.class_shaman.description: A powerful shaman class with unique abilities and devastating combat skills.  Passive: Self Recovery. Activates automatically during combat.
mbx.items.class_shaman.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_shaman.name: Shaman
mbx.items.class_summoner.description: A powerful summoner class with unique abilities and devastating combat skills.  Passive: Spirit Guardian. Activates automatically during combat.
mbx.items.class_summoner.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.

mbx.items.class_terramancer.description: A powerful terramancer class with unique abilities and devastating combat skills.  Passive: Earth Ring. Activates automatically during combat.  Passive: Earth Spikes. Activates automatically during combat.
mbx.items.class_terramancer.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_terramancer.name: Terramancer
mbx.items.class_triarch.description: A close-range assassin-samurai wielding fire, water and storm in fluid elemental combos.
mbx.items.class_triarch.lore: Three elements, one blade, a silent storm at arm's reach, victory carved in flashes.
mbx.items.class_triarch.name: Triarch
mbx.items.class_warrior.description: A powerful warrior class with unique abilities and devastating combat skills.  Passive: Rampage. Activates automatically during combat.
mbx.items.class_warrior.lore: Power flows through combat, ancient arts unleashed at will, legends forged in war.
mbx.items.class_warrior.name: Warrior
mbx.items.clockwork_spring.lore: Rusty and ancient. Once wound something important, now it just squeaks.
mbx.items.clockwork_spring.name: Clockwork Spring
mbx.items.clover_bottle.lore: Luck bottled up, this clover elixir brings fortune your way.
mbx.items.clover_bottle.name: Clover Bottle
mbx.items.clown_backpack.lore: Endless scarves spill from within, one very angry pie waits inside, absolutely no refunds.
mbx.items.clown_backpack.name: Piepack
mbx.items.clown_goofish_bone.lore: Bone of a laughing clown, perfect for pranks, and spooky surprises.
mbx.items.clown_goofish_bone.name: Clown goofish bone
mbx.items.clown_goofish_tooth.lore: For a dazzling smile, and biting jokes, the choice of the marine clown.
mbx.items.clown_goofish_tooth.name: Clown goofish tooth
mbx.items.clownfish_curry.lore: A splash of spice, and a hint of laughter, a curry that juggles your senses.
mbx.items.clownfish_curry.name: Clownfish Curry
mbx.items.club_sandwich.lore: The high-rise of sandwiches, stacked so tall you'll need an elevator for each bite.
mbx.items.club_sandwich.name: Club Sandwich
mbx.items.cobalt_alloy.lore: Blending strength and style, this alloy makes your gear both tough and trendy.
mbx.items.cobalt_alloy.name: Cobalt Alloy
mbx.items.coconut.lore: Hard outside, sweet inside, crack it open for a tropical delight!
mbx.items.coconut.name: Coconut
mbx.items.coconut_backpack.lore: Carries your hopes, dreams, and a splash of coconut milk.
mbx.items.coconut_backpack.name: Coconut Backpack
mbx.items.coconut_belt.lore: Holds your pants up, and your island vibes even higher.
mbx.items.coconut_belt.name: Coconut Belt
mbx.items.coconut_boots.lore: Tropical kicks, perfect for stomping through sandy beaches.
mbx.items.coconut_boots.name: Coconut Boots
mbx.items.coconut_candy.lore: Tiny tropical vacations in every bite, just don’t forget your sunscreen.
mbx.items.coconut_candy.name: Coconut Candy
mbx.items.coconut_chestplate.lore: Armored in shells, deflecting blows and terrible vacation songs.
mbx.items.coconut_chestplate.name: Coconut Chestplate
mbx.items.coconut_cocktail.lore: Drink in hand, this coconut delight throws its own beach party.
mbx.items.coconut_cocktail.name: Coconut Cocktail
mbx.items.coconut_hat.lore: Two coconuts where your ears go one head trapped between them and a whole beach in spirit.
mbx.items.coconut_hat.name: Coconoggin
mbx.items.coconut_helmet.lore: Protects your brain, though mostly from overheating in the sun.
mbx.items.coconut_helmet.name: Coconut Helmet
mbx.items.coconut_juice.lore: Refreshment straight from the palm trees, perfect for those moments when you need a sip of paradise.
mbx.items.coconut_juice.name: Coconut Juice
mbx.items.coconut_leggings.lore: Hugging legs like a gentle breeze from a tropical paradise.
mbx.items.coconut_leggings.name: Coconut Leggings
mbx.items.coconut_necklace.lore: Crafted from shells, strung with threads of relaxed indifference.
mbx.items.coconut_necklace.name: Coconut Necklace
mbx.items.coconut_powder.lore: Sprinkle it on everything. Even things you shouldn't. For a tropical disaster.
mbx.items.coconut_powder.name: Coconut Powder
mbx.items.coconut_ring.lore: Small, round, and full of island charm, minus the cocktails.
mbx.items.coconut_ring.name: Coconut Ring
mbx.items.coconut_salad.lore: The ultimate salad for when lettuce just doesn’t cut it in the coconut department.
mbx.items.coconut_salad.name: Coconut Salad
mbx.items.coffee_gray.lore: For those gray mornings, a cup to match your mood, perks you right up.
mbx.items.coffee_gray.name: Gray coffee
mbx.items.coffee_green.lore: An eco-friendly brew, to energize your day, green power!
mbx.items.coffee_green.name: Green coffee
mbx.items.coffee_white.lore: Smooth and creamy, a gentle start, to your day.
mbx.items.coffee_white.name: White coffee
mbx.items.coffee_yellow.lore: Bright and cheerful, a sunny sip, to lift your spirits.
mbx.items.coffee_yellow.name: Yellow coffee
mbx.items.computer_boots.lore: Stomp with strength brains in every step agility? What's that?
mbx.items.computer_boots.name: Computer Boots
mbx.items.computer_chestplate.lore: Armor of a coder strength in numbers and lines of code.
mbx.items.computer_chestplate.name: Computer Chestplate
mbx.items.computer_helmet.lore: Head in the clouds or stuck in a screen geek chic.
mbx.items.computer_helmet.name: Computer Helmet
mbx.items.computer_leggings.lore: Run with intelligence wisdom at your core just don't trip over cables.
mbx.items.computer_leggings.name: Computer Leggings
mbx.items.computer_necklace.lore: Wear your smarts and a bit of strength techie style.
mbx.items.computer_necklace.name: Computer Necklace
mbx.items.computer_ring.lore: Ring of power strength and wisdom geek's best friend.
mbx.items.computer_ring.name: Computer Ring
mbx.items.computer_sword.lore: Precision-coded sharpness, slices through bugs and glitches with ruthless efficiency.
mbx.items.computer_sword.name: Computer Sword
mbx.items.cooked_lobster.lore: Once a fancy sea bug, now a gourmet delight, served with a side of guilt.
mbx.items.cooked_lobster.name: Cooked Lobster
mbx.items.cowboy_backpack.lore: Tassels swing in the breeze, smells faintly of horse, allegedly endorsed by Texas.
mbx.items.cowboy_backpack.name: Yeehaw Pack
mbx.items.cowrie_shell_soup.lore: Smooth and rich, a shellfish surprise, sip it slowly, savor the sea.
mbx.items.cowrie_shell_soup.name: Cowrie Shell Soup
mbx.items.crab_beard.lore: A beard of crabs, ticklish and funny, nautical fashion.
mbx.items.crab_beard.name: Crab beard
mbx.items.crab_boxing_glove.lore: For underwater brawls, perfect for delivering a punchy pinch!
mbx.items.crab_boxing_glove.name: Crab boxing glove
mbx.items.cracked_lens.lore: Looking through this is like being drunk without the fun part.
mbx.items.cracked_lens.name: Cracked Lens
mbx.items.cracked_orb.lore: It used to glow. Now it just leaks some weird purple goo.
mbx.items.cracked_orb.name: Cracked Orb
mbx.items.crew_1.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's efficiency.
mbx.items.crew_1.lore: They don't know port from starboard, but they're very enthusiastic about lunch breaks.
mbx.items.crew_1.name: Rookie Crew
mbx.items.crew_2.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's efficiency.
mbx.items.crew_2.lore: Seasoned like a good steak. They've seen storms, krakens, and the captain's cooking. Survived all three.
mbx.items.crew_2.name: Seasoned Crew
mbx.items.crew_3.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's efficiency.
mbx.items.crew_3.lore: Each one worth ten ordinary sailors. Unfortunately, they also eat like ten ordinary sailors.
mbx.items.crew_3.name: Elite Crew
mbx.items.crew_4.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's efficiency.
mbx.items.crew_4.lore: Rumor has it they once sailed through a hurricane while playing cards. Nobody folded. Not even the ship.
mbx.items.crew_4.name: Legendary Crew
mbx.items.croissant.lore: Deliciously crispy, perfect with coffee, or for crumb fights.
mbx.items.croissant.name: Croissant
mbx.items.crop_barley.lore: A peasant's pride and a baker's first treasure.
mbx.items.crop_barley.name: Barley
mbx.items.crop_corn.lore: Sweet, bright, and loud like market day in town.
mbx.items.crop_corn.name: Corn
mbx.items.crop_quinoa_green.lore: Young grains with surprisingly noble flavor.
mbx.items.crop_quinoa_green.name: Green Quinoa
mbx.items.crop_quinoa_orange.lore: A sunset in your pouch, and stew in your future.
mbx.items.crop_quinoa_orange.name: Orange Quinoa
mbx.items.crop_quinoa_purple.lore: Favored by nobles, priced for adventurers.
mbx.items.crop_quinoa_purple.name: Purple Quinoa
mbx.items.crop_quinoa_red.lore: Robust grains for long roads and harder fights.
mbx.items.crop_quinoa_red.name: Red Quinoa
mbx.items.crop_quinoa_yellow.lore: Golden as a lux, light but never cheap.
mbx.items.crop_quinoa_yellow.name: Yellow Quinoa
mbx.items.crop_rice.lore: Small white grains, big tavern profits.
mbx.items.crop_rice.name: Rice
mbx.items.crop_rye.lore: Grows where boots sink and heroes lose patience.
mbx.items.crop_rye.name: Rye
mbx.items.crow_s_beak.lore: Sharper than your wit, and twice as pointy. Handle with care.
mbx.items.crow_s_beak.name: Crow's Beak
mbx.items.crow_wing.lore: Once majestic, now just a feathery mess. Good for dusting.
mbx.items.crow_wing.name: Crow Wing
mbx.items.crumbled_rune.lore: The magic is gone. Only dust remains. Magical dust. Still dust though.
mbx.items.crumbled_rune.name: Crumbled Rune
mbx.items.cute_eye_spider.lore: It's cute until it's crawling up your leg. Run now, scream later.
mbx.items.cute_eye_spider.name: Cute Eye Spider
mbx.items.dagger_banana_splitter.lore: No slipping allowed. A real peel-y weapon. They'll split… in fear!
mbx.items.dagger_banana_splitter.name: Banana Splitter
mbx.items.dagger_butter_cutter.lore: Slick and smooth. Goes through foes like butter. No churn needed.
mbx.items.dagger_butter_cutter.name: Butter Cutter
mbx.items.dagger_cheese_grater.lore: Shreds enemies to bits. Extra sharp for battle. Not just for parmesan.
mbx.items.dagger_cheese_grater.name: Cheese Grater
mbx.items.dagger_daggerfall.lore: A torrent of stabs. Enemies don't see it coming. Watery slice of doom.
mbx.items.dagger_daggerfall.name: Daggerfall
mbx.items.dagger_daggeridoo.lore: Makes a whistle when it cuts. Deadly and melodic. Chop with a didgeridoo twist!
mbx.items.dagger_daggeridoo.name: Daggeridoo
mbx.items.dagger_daggerine.lore: Sharp, juicy, zesty. Leaves foes in segments. No peeling away from battle.
mbx.items.dagger_daggerine.name: Daggerine
mbx.items.dagger_daggermuffin.lore: A tasty demise. Freshly baked, brutally sharp. Muffin to lose!
mbx.items.dagger_daggermuffin.name: Daggermuffin
mbx.items.dagger_forked_fury.lore: Serves up defeat. Table manners optional. Stick a fork in 'em!
mbx.items.dagger_forked_fury.name: Forked Fury
mbx.items.dagger_jesters_jest.lore: Laughs and stabs. Deadly punchline included. Jokes you to death.
mbx.items.dagger_jesters_jest.name: Jester's Jest
mbx.items.dagger_paper_cut.lore: Small but painful. Like a thousand paper cuts. Stings more than it should.
mbx.items.dagger_paper_cut.name: Paper Cut
mbx.items.dagger_pencil_point.lore: Writing foes off. Extra sharp, no erasers. Scribbles of doom.
mbx.items.dagger_pencil_point.name: Pencil Point
mbx.items.dagger_sneaky_peeler.lore: Unpeels defenses. A cut above the rest. Layer by layer destruction.
mbx.items.dagger_sneaky_peeler.name: Sneaky Peeler
mbx.items.dagger_spoon_stabber.lore: Blunt but relentless. Not the sharpest tool. Still hurts though.
mbx.items.dagger_spoon_stabber.name: Spoon Stabber
mbx.items.dagger_spreader.lore: Smooth, deadly application. Jam-packed with defeat. Buttery precision.
mbx.items.dagger_spreader.name: Spreader
mbx.items.dagger_toast_tickler.lore: Makes your enemies crumble. Best thing since sliced pain. A real jammy defeat.
mbx.items.dagger_toast_tickler.name: Toast Tickler
mbx.items.dark_coconut.lore: Hides a secret, mysterious and tough, a tropical enigma.
mbx.items.dark_coconut.name: Dark Coconut
mbx.items.deep_fried_snowflake.lore: Crispy, yet cold. Gives you a chill, and indigestion.
mbx.items.deep_fried_snowflake.name: Deep-Fried Snowflake
mbx.items.disc.description: A music disc that can be played on a Jukebox Pro Max Ultra™.
mbx.items.disc_bamboo.lore: The wind through the bamboo tells stories older than time. Most of them are about lunch.
mbx.items.disc_bamboo.name: OST: Whispers of the Grove
mbx.items.disc_bamboo_fight.lore: Even the pandas stop chewing when this melody echoes through. That's how you know it's serious.
mbx.items.disc_bamboo_fight.name: OST: Whispers of the Grove (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_bamboo_forest.lore: Recorded the night the spirits moved a whole shrine three feet east without anyone asking them to.
mbx.items.disc_bamboo_forest.name: OST: Lanterns at Dusk
mbx.items.disc_bamboo_forest_fight.lore: Even the pandas pick up bo staffs when this riff drops at minute two. Especially the pandas. Mostly the pandas.
mbx.items.disc_bamboo_forest_fight.name: OST: Lanterns at Dusk (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_beach.lore: Recorded with the gentle crash of waves and the distant screams of someone stepping on a sea urchin.
mbx.items.disc_beach.name: OST: Tides of Coconut Bay
mbx.items.disc_beach_fight.lore: When the tide turns violent even the palm trees pick sides. Spoiler: they don't pick yours.
mbx.items.disc_beach_fight.name: OST: Tides of Coconut Bay (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_burned_jungle.lore: The beaver hums this when nobody's looking. Three centuries of grief made into chords you can almost dance to. Almost.
mbx.items.disc_burned_jungle.name: OST: Ash and Memory
mbx.items.disc_burned_jungle_fight.lore: Cinderhook's ghost would not approve. Which is why the beaver insisted the percussion be extra aggressive.
mbx.items.disc_burned_jungle_fight.name: OST: Ash and Memory (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_canyon.lore: Every note is a SaberCorp diagnostic beep the canyon refuses to forget. Even the droids hum along now.
mbx.items.disc_canyon.name: OST: Static of the Buried Hangar
mbx.items.disc_canyon_fight.lore: Cannon fire kept tempo for the recording. Jett insists this counts as collaboration. Jett is wrong about many things.
mbx.items.disc_canyon_fight.name: OST: Static of the Buried Hangar (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_cherry_forest.lore: The blossoms fall in perfect time. The composer swears she didn't time them. The blossoms disagree, politely.
mbx.items.disc_cherry_forest.name: OST: Petals in the Wind
mbx.items.disc_cherry_forest_fight.lore: A swordfight set to falling petals is just choreography with consequences. The petals don't pick sides. Usually.
mbx.items.disc_cherry_forest_fight.name: OST: Petals in the Wind (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_church.lore: The organist hit a note so pure it converted three skeletons and a particularly stubborn rock.
mbx.items.disc_church.name: Holy Decibels
mbx.items.disc_cityhall.lore: This plays on loop while your building permit gets denied. For the seventh time this week.
mbx.items.disc_cityhall.name: The Mayor's Elevator
mbx.items.disc_cloud.lore: Recorded somewhere no one should be standing. The composer denies ever being up there. The clouds back up his story. Convenient.
mbx.items.disc_cloud.name: OST: Above the Weather
mbx.items.disc_cloud_fight.lore: Thunder on the downbeat. Lightning on the rest. Whoever balanced this mix is missing all five of their original eyebrows.
mbx.items.disc_cloud_fight.name: OST: Above the Weather (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_dark_jungle.lore: Crow witches once sent letters by song. Most of the letters were complaints about the rest of the crow witches.
mbx.items.disc_dark_jungle.name: OST: Whispers of the Korv
mbx.items.disc_dark_jungle_fight.lore: The flock dives in formation to this beat. Mariev still pretends she didn't teach them. She taught them. She taught them everything.
mbx.items.disc_dark_jungle_fight.name: OST: Whispers of the Korv (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_desert.lore: The composer wrote this mid-heatstroke and claims each note is a different hallucination he had that day.
mbx.items.disc_desert.name: OST: Mirage of the Dunes
mbx.items.disc_desert_fight.lore: Sand in your ears. Sand in your sword. Sand in places you didn't know existed. This track makes it feel intentional.
mbx.items.disc_desert_fight.name: OST: Mirage of the Dunes (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_dojo.lore: Master Wu recorded this between naps. He claims the silence between notes is where the real fighting happens.
mbx.items.disc_dojo.name: Fist of the Napping Dragon
mbx.items.disc_fragment.lore: A shattered piece of vinyl, still humming with forgotten melodies. Collect enough and maybe someone can make something out of it.
mbx.items.disc_fragment.name: Disc Fragment
mbx.items.disc_glacier.lore: Brassbeard wrote the whole composition while crying onto a soldering iron. The iron still works. Mostly.
mbx.items.disc_glacier.name: OST: Ironwork and Steam
mbx.items.disc_glacier_fight.lore: Uxyonno's roar in the bassline. The Cogtribe lay down the percussion. Surprisingly catchy. Worryingly so.
mbx.items.disc_glacier_fight.name: OST: Ironwork and Steam (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_halloween.lore: This tune makes ghosts uncomfortable and skeletons question their life choices. Best played with the lights off.
mbx.items.disc_halloween.name: OST: Pumpkin's Requiem
mbx.items.disc_italian_dinner.lore: Recorded live at a dinner where the chef cried into the risotto. Critics called it 'deliciously emotional.'
mbx.items.disc_italian_dinner.name: Pasta La Vista
mbx.items.disc_italian_mafia.lore: They say the composer disappeared the night after the recording. Nobody asks questions anymore.
mbx.items.disc_italian_mafia.name: The Godfiddle
mbx.items.disc_jazz.lore: The saxophone player was so smooth he talked his way out of three arrests during the recording session.
mbx.items.disc_jazz.name: Smooth Crookinal
mbx.items.disc_jungle.lore: The jungle hums with hidden wonders and things with far too many legs. Best enjoyed with your guard up.
mbx.items.disc_jungle.name: OST: Echoes of the Canopy
mbx.items.disc_jungle_fight.lore: When the trees sound angry and the birds stop singing, it's already too late to run.
mbx.items.disc_jungle_fight.name: OST: Echoes of the Canopy (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_market_trade.lore: Listening too long may cause you to negotiate the price of your own furniture. Side effects include compulsive bartering.
mbx.items.disc_market_trade.name: The Haggler's Hymn
mbx.items.disc_mexican_song.lore: The trumpets were so passionate they set a donkey on fire. The donkey didn't seem to mind.
mbx.items.disc_mexican_song.name: El Cactus Loco
mbx.items.disc_mystic_tree.lore: The moss hums along, sometimes off-key, and the Whisperer pretends not to notice. She notices. She always notices.
mbx.items.disc_mystic_tree.name: OST: Hum of the Sacred Grove
mbx.items.disc_mystic_tree_fight.lore: Fey magic in 4/4 time. The shamans add a fifth beat. Nobody knows where it came from.
mbx.items.disc_mystic_tree_fight.name: OST: Hum of the Sacred Grove (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_plain.lore: A tune from when the scarecrows were just decoration and the spiders minded their own business.
mbx.items.disc_plain.name: OST: Pastoral Daydream
mbx.items.disc_plain_fight.lore: The cows left. The music intensified. Coincidence? The scarecrows don't think so either.
mbx.items.disc_plain_fight.name: OST: Pastoral Daydream (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_pyramid.lore: Recorded inside the pharaoh's bedroom while he slept. Apparently he snores in three different ancient languages.
mbx.items.disc_pyramid.name: OST: Echoes of the Cinder Court
mbx.items.disc_pyramid_fight.lore: The Pyroguard march in perfect rhythm. Three centuries of practice and they still can't agree on the chorus.
mbx.items.disc_pyramid_fight.name: OST: Echoes of the Cinder Court (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_reggae.lore: Warning: prolonged exposure causes hammock addiction and an inability to care about anything ever again.
mbx.items.disc_reggae.name: Island Brainwash
mbx.items.disc_savanna.lore: Half drumline, half kobold karaoke complaint. Safari Sam claims he wrote it in a fever. Safari Sam writes everything in a fever.
mbx.items.disc_savanna.name: OST: Heartbeat of the Savanna
mbx.items.disc_savanna_fight.lore: When the Boldpikes form a line this drum drops and the dust answers. Don't blink. They count blinks.
mbx.items.disc_savanna_fight.name: OST: Heartbeat of the Savanna (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_ship_song.lore: This tune convinced an entire crew to mutiny for an encore. The captain joined in on verse two.
mbx.items.disc_ship_song.name: Sailor's Last Braincell
mbx.items.disc_shop.lore: Scientists confirm this melody increases impulse purchases by 300%. The shopkeepers deny everything.
mbx.items.disc_shop.name: Retail Therapy
mbx.items.disc_snow.lore: The snowflakes carry this tune across the tundra like tiny, cold, passive-aggressive messengers.
mbx.items.disc_snow.name: OST: Frozen Lullaby
mbx.items.disc_snow_fight.lore: Even the ice golems nod along right before smashing your face. At least they have good taste.
mbx.items.disc_snow_fight.name: OST: Frozen Lullaby (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_snow_forest.lore: Played at funerals the Archmage never had. Wynter finally lets herself listen without crying. Mostly. Sometimes.
mbx.items.disc_snow_forest.name: OST: Snowflake Sonata
mbx.items.disc_snow_forest_fight.lore: The Brrr-guard sharpen their blades in perfect rhythm with the strings. Frost takes the form of a metronome.
mbx.items.disc_snow_forest_fight.name: OST: Snowflake Sonata (Fight)
mbx.items.disc_swamp.lore: Somewhere between 'enchanting' and 'what was that noise?' lies this musical swamp experience.
mbx.items.disc_swamp.name: OST: Murky Serenade
mbx.items.disc_swamp_fight.lore: Fighting in the swamp is bad enough. This music makes it feel like the swamp itself is judging you.
mbx.items.disc_swamp_fight.name: OST: Murky Serenade (Fight)
mbx.items.divorce_potion.lore: One sip erases vows, two sips erase regrets, three sips and you're celebrating.
mbx.items.divorce_potion.name: Divorce Potion
mbx.items.dj_backpack.lore: Holds all the beats, dreams, and broken aux cables.
mbx.items.dj_backpack.name: DJ Backpack
mbx.items.dj_belt.lore: Keeps your style tight and your groove even tighter.
mbx.items.dj_belt.name: DJ Belt
mbx.items.dj_boots.lore: Stomp to the beat, crushing dancefloors and egos alike.
mbx.items.dj_boots.name: DJ Boots
mbx.items.dj_cap.lore: Half style, half mystery. Full homage to legends unmasked.
mbx.items.dj_cap.name: DJ Punkydaft
mbx.items.dj_chestplate.lore: Bounces off criticism like bass in a shady nightclub.
mbx.items.dj_chestplate.name: DJ Chestplate
mbx.items.dj_helmet.lore: Protects your head, and your playlist from bad requests.
mbx.items.dj_helmet.name: DJ Helmet
mbx.items.dj_leggings.lore: Tight fit, pure style. Allows maximum dancefloor agility.
mbx.items.dj_leggings.name: DJ Leggings
mbx.items.dj_necklace.lore: Blinged out with unearned confidence and overpriced LEDs.
mbx.items.dj_necklace.name: DJ Necklace
mbx.items.dj_ring.lore: Tiny but flashy. Guaranteed to make hands look important.
mbx.items.dj_ring.name: DJ Ring
mbx.items.dolomite_crystal.lore: A sparkling gem for rock collectors and earth enthusiasts alike.
mbx.items.dolomite_crystal.name: Dolomite Crystal
mbx.items.dragon_red_backpack.lore: Flaps heroically in still air and bites your shoulder if you forget to feed it on Sundays.
mbx.items.dragon_red_backpack.name: Draco Cloak
mbx.items.dragon_red_helmet.lore: Forged in dragonfire and still warm to the touch even today, roars at strangers without warning.
mbx.items.dragon_red_helmet.name: Draco Crest
mbx.items.dragon_red_sword.lore: One swing brings regret, two swings bring fire, three swings bring tax forms.
mbx.items.dragon_red_sword.name: Draco Fang
mbx.items.dragonfly_powder.lore: Buzzed too close to the sun, now trapped in powder form, and still judging you.
mbx.items.dragonfly_powder.name: Dragonfly Powder
mbx.items.drawing_board.lore: Ideal for artists' visions, a canvas for plans, bring ideas to life.
mbx.items.drawing_board.name: Drawing Board
mbx.items.dried_bamboo_pipe.lore: Smells faintly of tea, but can't be used for much. Unless you like decorative pipes.
mbx.items.dried_bamboo_pipe.name: Dried Bamboo Pipe
mbx.items.dried_poison_leaf.lore: Once potent. Now just a crunchy leaf. Tastes like regret.
mbx.items.dried_poison_leaf.name: Dried Poison Leaf
mbx.items.dune_worm_toothpick.lore: Sharp, sturdy, and slightly sandy. Best used after meals.
mbx.items.dune_worm_toothpick.name: Dune Worm Toothpick
mbx.items.ebony_carving.lore: Dark and detailed, crafted with precision, a work of art.
mbx.items.ebony_carving.name: Ebony Carving

mbx.items.elemental_harmony_medley.name: Elemental Harmony Medley
mbx.items.emmental_cheese.lore: So full of holes, it's a miracle there's any cheese left.
mbx.items.emmental_cheese.name: Emmental Cheese

mbx.items.emote.name: Emote

mbx.items.empty_rum_bottle.name: Empty Rum Bottle
mbx.items.empty_vial.lore: Contains absolutely nothing. A whole lot of nothing. Premium grade nothing.
mbx.items.empty_vial.name: Empty Vial
mbx.items.enchanted_ore_powder.lore: Magically infused dust, guaranteed to make your creations enchanting.
mbx.items.enchanted_ore_powder.name: Enchanted Ore Powder
mbx.items.enchanted_root.lore: Magic runs deep in this root, a source of mystical power.
mbx.items.enchanted_root.name: Enchanted Root
mbx.items.engraving_board.lore: Intricate designs, etched with care, a master's touch.
mbx.items.engraving_board.name: Engraving Board
mbx.items.enriched_pork.lore: Pork so rich it could probably buy your entire farm and still have change.
mbx.items.enriched_pork.name: Enriched Pork
mbx.items.essence_of_bamboo.lore: Smells like inner peace, bottled by someone who's definitely not at peace. Perfect for feeling 'natural,' but not too much.
mbx.items.essence_of_bamboo.name: Essence of Bamboo
mbx.items.essence_of_blue_starfish.lore: Blue as the ocean, this essence pulses with marine magic.
mbx.items.essence_of_blue_starfish.name: Essence of Blue Starfish
mbx.items.essence_of_boxer_crab.lore: Tough and feisty, this essence packs a punch like a boxer.
mbx.items.essence_of_boxer_crab.name: Essence of Boxer Crab
mbx.items.essence_of_clown_goofish.lore: Laugh and play, this essence brings joy and silliness.
mbx.items.essence_of_clown_goofish.name: Essence of Clown Goofish
mbx.items.essence_of_desert.lore: Cactus tears, sunburnt dust. Sniffing may attract sandworms. Moisture? A distant dream.
mbx.items.essence_of_desert.name: Essence of the Desert
mbx.items.essence_of_green_goofish.lore: Green and goofy, this essence tickles with mischievous energy.
mbx.items.essence_of_green_goofish.name: Essence of Green Goofish
mbx.items.essence_of_hammershark_goofish: Sharp and quirky, this essence carries the hammershark's spirit.
mbx.items.essence_of_ice.lore: A tear from a weeping glacier, forged in eternal winter's embrace, cold as the gaze of a forgotten god.
mbx.items.essence_of_ice.name: Essence of Ice
mbx.items.essence_of_magician_crab.lore: Abracadabra! This essence holds the secrets of a magical crustacean.
mbx.items.essence_of_magician_crab.name: Essence of Magician Crab
mbx.items.essence_of_marauder.lore: Cinder Court relic, brewed from sarcophagus dust and old bandages. The pharaoh's funeral rite, bottled.
mbx.items.essence_of_marauder.name: Essence of Marauder
mbx.items.essence_of_monkey.lore: Bananas and chaos, this essence swings wildly with monkey madness.
mbx.items.essence_of_monkey.name: Essence of Monkey
mbx.items.essence_of_orange_starfish.lor: Bright and vibrant, this essence glows with orange energy.
mbx.items.essence_of_pirate.lore: Smells of rum and trouble. Guaranteed to make you say 'Arrr!' involuntarily.
mbx.items.essence_of_pirate.name: Essence of Pirate
mbx.items.essence_of_reptile.lore: Distilled from shed scales and cold-blooded patience, it hisses softly as if still alive in the vial.
mbx.items.essence_of_reptile.name: Essence of the Reptile
mbx.items.essence_of_scavenger.lore: Ashes of a burned jungle, with whispers of lost life and scavenged remains.
mbx.items.essence_of_scavenger.name: Essence of Scavenger
mbx.items.essence_of_slime.lore: Bottled blob juice, freshly wobbled. Sticks to everything, especially your dignity.
mbx.items.essence_of_slime.name: Essence of Slime
mbx.items.essence_of_swamp.lore: A delicate blend of soggy mud, rotten root stench, and farting mushrooms. Best uncorked outdoors… for everyone's sake.
mbx.items.essence_of_swamp.name: Essence of the Swamp
mbx.items.eucalyptus_oil.lore: Fresh and fragrant, nature's remedy, calming essence.
mbx.items.eucalyptus_oil.name: Eucalyptus Oil
mbx.items.experience_tome.name: Experience Tome
mbx.items.explorer_hat.lore: Knows every wrong path and sells maps for the right ones with the air of unshakeable confidence.
mbx.items.explorer_hat.name: Sir-vey Hat
mbx.items.explosive_ender_elixir.lore: Sip with caution, this elixir packs an ender-sized punch.
mbx.items.explosive_ender_elixir.name: Explosive Ender Elixir
mbx.items.extra_smelly_fish_juice.lore: Hold your nose, and take a sip, only the brave will savor this!
mbx.items.extra_smelly_fish_juice.name: Extra Smelly Fish Juice
mbx.items.faded_coin.lore: Heads or tails? Impossible to tell. Not accepted anywhere.
mbx.items.faded_coin.name: Faded Coin
mbx.items.fairy_dust.lore: A puff of sparkling powder. Dissipates almost instantly. A fleeting moment of magic.
mbx.items.fairy_dust.name: Fairy Dust
mbx.items.fallen_halo_shard.lore: Used to glow brightly, now it's just a dull ring. Still looks kind of important.
mbx.items.fallen_halo_shard.name: Fallen Halo Shard
mbx.items.fallen_star.lore: Once a celestial wonder, now just a rare piece of cosmic junk. Shiny, but ultimately useless.
mbx.items.fallen_star.name: Fallen Star
mbx.items.feather_of_twilight.lore: Glows faintly with celestial light. But it's just a feather. Not much use beyond looking cool.
mbx.items.feather_of_twilight.name: Feather of Twilight
mbx.items.feathered_turtle_brew.lore: When turtles fly, this brew is what keeps them aloft.
mbx.items.feathered_turtle_brew.name: Feathered Turtle Brew
mbx.items.fire_and_ice_backpack.lore: Half lava and half blizzard all bad packing decisions inside and pleases neither climate.
mbx.items.fire_and_ice_backpack.name: Polarpack
mbx.items.fish_anchovy.lore: Tiny and salty, ruins pizzas worldwide, not sorry about it.
mbx.items.fish_anchovy.name: Anchovy
