mbx.items.fish_angelfish.name: Angelfish
mbx.items.fish_barracuda.lore: Smile full of teeth, personality full of rage, swims like it hates you.
mbx.items.fish_barracuda.name: Barracuda
mbx.items.fish_blobfish.lore: Nature’s cruel joke, a face only gravity could love, meme legend, deep-sea disgrace.
mbx.items.fish_blobfish.name: Blobfish
mbx.items.fish_blue_tang.lore: Bright, bubbly, forgetful, swims in circles with pride, directionally challenged.
mbx.items.fish_blue_tang.name: Blue Tang
mbx.items.fish_breaded_fish.lore: Golden and crispy, a favorite in any fry-up, even kids love it.
mbx.items.fish_breaded_fish.name: Breaded Fish
mbx.items.fish_butterflyfish.lore: Flutters in the sea, spreading colors and joy, a reef's little jewel!
mbx.items.fish_butterflyfish.name: Butterflyfish
mbx.items.fish_carp.lore: Freshwater filler, always around, never invited, flops like your last project.
mbx.items.fish_carp.name: Carp
mbx.items.fish_chips.lore: Crispy and golden, the fish that launched a thousand chips.
mbx.items.fish_chips.name: Fish and Chips
mbx.items.fish_clam.lore: Quiet and shy, hides beneath the sand, harboring hidden treasures.
mbx.items.fish_clam.name: Clam
mbx.items.fish_clownfish.lore: Not just for laughs, this fish can juggle bubbles and your troubles!
mbx.items.fish_clownfish.name: Clownfish
mbx.items.fish_cowrie_shell.lore: Shiny and smooth, a little ocean gem, prized by collectors.
mbx.items.fish_cowrie_shell.name: Cowrie Shell
mbx.items.fish_electric_eel.lore: Shocks more than your ex, lights up your life—literally, no batteries required.
mbx.items.fish_electric_eel.name: Electric Eel
mbx.items.fish_flying_fish.lore: Thinks it’s a bird, fails at landing gracefully, gravity’s biggest fan.
mbx.items.fish_flying_fish.name: Flying Fish
mbx.items.fish_frogfish.lore: Walks like it’s lost, blends in like a coward, ambush predator with anxiety.
mbx.items.fish_frogfish.name: Frogfish
mbx.items.fish_goby.lore: Tiny fish, big ego, moves sand like it’s art, owns the ocean floor.
mbx.items.fish_goby.name: Goby
mbx.items.fish_golden_shrimp.lore: Tiny and golden, glimmers like a treasure, worth its weight in gold.
mbx.items.fish_golden_shrimp.name: Golden Shrimp
mbx.items.fish_goldfish.lore: Glorified pond decoration, forgets everything, including you.
mbx.items.fish_goldfish.name: Goldfish
mbx.items.fish_green_ray.lore: Graceful swimmer, gliding through the sea, a green wonder.
mbx.items.fish_green_ray.name: Green Ray
mbx.items.fish_haddock.lore: Generic white fish, goes well with fries, lives to be eaten.
mbx.items.fish_haddock.name: Haddock
mbx.items.fish_humpback_chub.lore: Name’s a mess, face is worse, nature’s awkward phase in fish form.
mbx.items.fish_humpback_chub.name: Humpback Chub
mbx.items.fish_john_dory.lore: Named like a guy, looks like a mistake, tastes surprisingly decent.
mbx.items.fish_john_dory.name: John Dory
mbx.items.fish_kraken.lore: Legendary beast, ruler of the deep, fear its tentacles.
mbx.items.fish_kraken.name: Kraken
mbx.items.fish_lionfish.lore: King of the ocean, with spiky crown, beware its royal sting!
mbx.items.fish_lionfish.name: Lionfish
mbx.items.fish_lobster.lore: Fancy sea bug, red when embarrassed (or boiled), serves well with butter.
mbx.items.fish_lobster.name: Lobster
mbx.items.fish_mandarinfish.lore: Dressed to impress, with a dance so dazzling, a reef's superstar!
mbx.items.fish_mandarinfish.name: Mandarinfish
mbx.items.fish_monkfish.lore: Not the prettiest, but oh so tasty, a chef's delight.
mbx.items.fish_monkfish.name: Monkfish
mbx.items.fish_moon_jellyfish.lore: Glows in the dark, a lunar beauty, dances in the waves.
mbx.items.fish_moon_jellyfish.name: Moon Jellyfish
mbx.items.fish_moorish_idol.lore: A symbol of beauty, and elegance in the waves, an ocean's gem!
mbx.items.fish_moorish_idol.name: Moorish Idol
mbx.items.fish_moray_eel.lore: Always hiding, never smiling, your finger’s worst nightmare.
mbx.items.fish_moray_eel.name: Moray Eel
mbx.items.fish_nautilus.lore: Old as time, spirals like it's confused, a fossil with ambition.
mbx.items.fish_nautilus.name: Nautilus
mbx.items.fish_octopus.lore: Eight arms, no boundaries, escape artist deluxe, your jar lid’s worst enemy.
mbx.items.fish_octopus.name: Octopus
mbx.items.fish_parrotfish.lore: Talks like a sailor, eats like a bird, decorates the reef!
mbx.items.fish_parrotfish.name: Parrotfish
mbx.items.fish_pearl.lore: Born from a clam, a gem of the sea, shines with elegance.
mbx.items.fish_pearl.name: Pearl
mbx.items.fish_piranha.lore: Tiny bite, big attitude, hangry 24/7, teeth sharper than your wit.
mbx.items.fish_piranha.name: Piranha
mbx.items.fish_pirate_crab.lore: Arr matey, steals treasures and hearts, a swashbuckling crustacean.
mbx.items.fish_pirate_crab.name: Pirate Crab
mbx.items.fish_rainbow_sparkle_jelly.lor: Colors of the rainbow, sparkles like magic, a whimsical wonder.
mbx.items.fish_rainbow_trout.lore: Multicolored scales, swims with grace, a fisherman's pride.
mbx.items.fish_rainbow_trout.name: Rainbow Trout
mbx.items.fish_razorback_sucker.lore: Sucks at everything—literally, back’s got a blade, edgy but useless.
mbx.items.fish_razorback_sucker.name: Razorback Sucker
mbx.items.fish_reef_shark.lore: Looks dangerous, acts chill, terrifies tourists anyway.
mbx.items.fish_reef_shark.name: Reef Shark
mbx.items.fish_salad.lore: Fresh and light, a healthy bite, swim into a sea of greens.
mbx.items.fish_salad.name: Fish Salad
mbx.items.fish_sandwich.lore: Catch of the day, tucked between bread like a tasty seafood secret.
mbx.items.fish_sandwich.name: Fish Sandwich
mbx.items.fish_sawfish.lore: Fish with a chainsaw face, doesn't do carpentry, still looks like a threat.
mbx.items.fish_sawfish.name: Sawfish
mbx.items.fish_shrimp.lore: Tiny and tasty, a delight in dishes, a bite-sized treat.
mbx.items.fish_shrimp.name: Shrimp
mbx.items.fish_snow_crab.lore: From icy waters, a frosty delight, chilled to perfection.
mbx.items.fish_snow_crab.name: Snow Crab
mbx.items.fish_surgeonfish.lore: Sharp as a scalpel, cuts through water like a pro, heals with its presence!
mbx.items.fish_surgeonfish.name: Surgeonfish
mbx.items.fish_sushi_crab.lore: Wrapped in seaweed, a sushi lover's dream, fresh and flavorful.
mbx.items.fish_sushi_crab.name: Sushi Crab
mbx.items.fish_swordfish.lore: Sharp as a sword, swift in the sea, a predator's pride.
mbx.items.fish_swordfish.name: Swordfish
mbx.items.fish_triggerfish.lore: Bold and brash, guards its turf fiercely, a true sea warrior!
mbx.items.fish_triggerfish.name: Triggerfish
mbx.items.fish_tuna.lore: Big fish, bigger ego, canned fame icon, swims like it owns the ocean.
mbx.items.fish_tuna.name: Tuna
mbx.items.fish_wrasse.lore: Friendly helper fish, cleans up the reef, everyone's best buddy!
mbx.items.fish_wrasse.name: Wrasse
mbx.items.fish_zander.lore: Elusive and cunning, a fisherman's challenge, worth the pursuit.
mbx.items.fish_zander.name: Zander
mbx.items.fishing_rod_plank.lore: Strong and flexible, ideal for anglers, crafted with care.
mbx.items.fishing_rod_plank.name: Fishing Rod Plank
mbx.items.five_leaf_clover_elixir.lore: Five times the luck, this elixir is a rare find.
mbx.items.five_leaf_clover_elixir.name: Five Leaf Clover Elixir
mbx.items.flesh_bullion.lore: A broth so thick, you’ll question if it’s still legal to eat.
mbx.items.flesh_bullion.name: Flesh Bullion
mbx.items.floral_essence.lore: Pure and fragrant, this essence captures the soul of flowers.
mbx.items.floral_essence.name: Floral Essence
mbx.items.flour.lore: The basic ingredient, for culinary creations, and flour fights!
mbx.items.flour.name: Flour
mbx.items.fluffy_cloud_wool.lore: Soft and fluffy. Evaporates if left out too long. Handle with care.
mbx.items.fluffy_cloud_wool.name: Fluffy Cloud Wool
mbx.items.fortified_plank.lore: A wooden board that's seen things. Fortified with glue, nails, and raw overcompensation.
mbx.items.fortified_plank.name: Fortified Plank
mbx.items.fortune_cookie.lore: A big change is coming, or maybe not. Fortunes are tricky.
mbx.items.fortune_cookie.name: Fortune Cookie
mbx.items.foxglove_draught.lore: Handle with care, this draught is as potent as it is beautiful.
mbx.items.foxglove_draught.name: Foxglove Draught
mbx.items.fragment_key_common.descriptio: Collect enough fragments to forge a real key.
mbx.items.fragment_key_common.lore: Looks like someone dropped their key in a blender. At least you got a piece.
mbx.items.fragment_key_common.name: Common Key Fragment
mbx.items.fragment_key_epic.description: Collect enough fragments to forge a real key.
mbx.items.fragment_key_epic.lore: So epic it almost opened a treasure on its own. Almost. Keep collecting.
mbx.items.fragment_key_epic.name: Epic Key Fragment
mbx.items.fragment_key_legendary.descrip: Collect enough fragments to forge a real key.
mbx.items.fragment_key_legendary.lore: Legends say this fragment was sneezed out by a dragon. Handle with... caution.
mbx.items.fragment_key_legendary.name: Legendary Key Fragment
mbx.items.fragment_key_mythic.descriptio: Collect enough fragments to forge a real key.
mbx.items.fragment_key_mythic.lore: Whispers ancient secrets when you hold it. Just kidding, that's your stomach growling.
mbx.items.fragment_key_mythic.name: Mythic Key Fragment
mbx.items.fragment_key_rare.description: Collect enough fragments to forge a real key.
mbx.items.fragment_key_rare.lore: Rare enough to brag about, but not rare enough to put on your resume.
mbx.items.fragment_key_rare.name: Rare Key Fragment
mbx.items.fragment_key_uncommon.descript: Collect enough fragments to forge a real key.
mbx.items.fragment_key_uncommon.lore: Slightly shinier than the common one. Your mom would still not be impressed.
mbx.items.fragment_key_uncommon.name: Uncommon Key Fragment
mbx.items.french_fries.lore: The real reason people eat burgers, let's be frank about fries.
mbx.items.french_fries.name: French Fries
mbx.items.fried_chicken.lore: Crispy, golden, and just greasy enough to make you forget your diet.
mbx.items.fried_chicken.name: Fried Chicken
mbx.items.fried_egg.lore: The ultimate breakfast diva, yolk and all, ready to star on your plate.
mbx.items.fried_egg.name: Fried Egg
mbx.items.frosted_beard_comb.lore: For those frosty mornings. Keeps your beard cold and stylish.
mbx.items.frosted_beard_comb.name: Frosted Beard Comb
mbx.items.frosty_paw_mittens.lore: Keeps your paws warm, but smells like wet dog. Comfort comes at a price.
mbx.items.frosty_paw_mittens.name: Frosty Paw Mittens
mbx.items.frozen_heart_chip.lore: A sliver of cold, perfect for freezing just about anything.
mbx.items.frozen_heart_chip.name: Frozen Heart Chip
mbx.items.frozen_tail_amulet.lore: Boosts agility, but your tail will feel cold for a while.
mbx.items.frozen_tail_amulet.name: Frozen Tail Amulet
mbx.items.gaming_headset_hat.lore: Cancels out toxic teammates, amplifies your own sweat, and guarantees GG well played.
mbx.items.gaming_headset_hat.name: Tilt Reducer 5000
mbx.items.gary_helmet.lore: Meow your way to victory with Gary's wisdom.
mbx.items.gary_helmet.name: Gary Helmet
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_belt.lore: Blends ninja stealth with gentle grace, perfect for silent warriors.
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_belt.name: Gentle Ninja Belt
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_boots.lore: Silent footsteps speed and fortune in every stride.
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_boots.name: Gentle Ninja Boots
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_chestplate.lore: Light as a feather protects with grace luck on your side.
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_chestplate.name: Gentle Ninja Chestplate
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_helmet.lore: Silent and swift this helmet hides your secret smile.
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_helmet.name: Gentle Ninja Helmet
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_leggings.lore: Run like the wind luck in every step move unseen.
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_leggings.name: Gentle Ninja Leggings
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_necklace.lore: Combines stealth with grace, perfect for the silent and gentle warrior.
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_necklace.name: Gentle Ninja Necklace
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_ring.lore: Combines stealth with grace, ideal for silent and gentle warriors.
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_ring.name: Gentle Ninja Ring
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_sword.lore: Silence in every strike, it cuts with precision and unexpected courtesy.
mbx.items.gentle_ninja_sword.name: Gentle Ninja Sword
mbx.items.ghost_cloak.name: Ghost Cloak
mbx.items.ghost_hat.name: Ghost Hat
mbx.items.ghost_necklace.name: Ghost Necklace
mbx.items.ghost_ring.name: Ghost Ring
mbx.items.ghostbuster_backpack.name: Ghostbuster Backpack
mbx.items.ghostbuster_belt.name: Ghostbuster Belt
mbx.items.ghostbuster_boots.name: Ghostbuster Boots
mbx.items.ghostbuster_chestplate.name: Ghostbuster Chestplate
mbx.items.ghostbuster_helmet.name: Ghostbuster Goggles
mbx.items.ghostbuster_leggings.name: Ghostbuster Leggings
mbx.items.ginger_root_infusion.lore: Spicy and warm, this infusion invigorates body and mind.
mbx.items.ginger_root_infusion.name: Ginger Root Infusion
mbx.items.gleaming_cog.lore: Shiny and perfectly circular. But it doesn't fit anything. Still looks valuable though.
mbx.items.gleaming_cog.name: Gleaming Cog
mbx.items.gloves_arcane_fingers.lore: Each finger casts a different spell. The pinky one is just rude.
mbx.items.gloves_arcane_fingers.name: Arcane Fingers
mbx.items.gloves_bear_paws.lore: Stolen from a very angry bear. He wants them back. You should probably run.
mbx.items.gloves_bear_paws.name: Bear Paws
mbx.items.gloves_butterfingers.lore: You'll drop everything except your luck. Greasy but oddly fortunate.
mbx.items.gloves_butterfingers.name: Butterfingers
mbx.items.gloves_chicken_legs.lore: Crispy on the outside, crunchy on the inside. Do NOT eat your gloves.
mbx.items.gloves_chicken_legs.name: Chicken Finger Gloves
mbx.items.gloves_crab_claws.lore: Snap snap! These pinchy gauntlets grip harder than your crippling debt.
mbx.items.gloves_crab_claws.name: Crab Claws
mbx.items.gloves_god_hand.lore: The ultimate slap. Gods tremble, mountains crumble, and your enemies ragequit.
mbx.items.gloves_god_hand.name: God Hand
mbx.items.gloves_grandma_knit.lore: Infused with love, cookies, and an unreasonable amount of protective magic.
mbx.items.gloves_grandma_knit.name: Grandma's Knitted Gloves
mbx.items.gloves_iron_fist.lore: Subtlety was never your strong suit anyway. Now punch through walls.
mbx.items.gloves_iron_fist.name: Iron Fist
mbx.items.gloves_jazz_hands.lore: Spirit fingers activate! Dazzle your foes with showmanship and sparkle.
mbx.items.gloves_jazz_hands.name: Jazz Hands
mbx.items.gloves_lucky_seven.lore: Roll the dice and win. Every. Single. Time. Vegas hates this glove.
mbx.items.gloves_lucky_seven.name: Lucky Seven
mbx.items.gloves_midas_touch.lore: Everything you touch turns to gold. Eating has become quite the challenge.
mbx.items.gloves_midas_touch.name: Midas Touch
mbx.items.gloves_octopus_grip.lore: Eight times the grip, eight times the awkward handshakes. Worth it.
mbx.items.gloves_octopus_grip.name: Octopus Grip
mbx.items.gloves_phantom_grip.lore: Are they even there? Your hands feel ghostly but hit surprisingly hard.
mbx.items.gloves_phantom_grip.name: Phantom Grip
mbx.items.gloves_rusty_mittens.lore: Found behind a barn, they smell like regret and questionable choices.
mbx.items.gloves_rusty_mittens.name: Rusty Mittens
mbx.items.gloves_shadow_grip.lore: Woven from pure darkness. Edgy? Yes. Effective? Also yes.
mbx.items.gloves_shadow_grip.name: Shadow Grip
mbx.items.gloves_slap_happy.lore: For when punching is too formal. Just slap your problems away.
mbx.items.gloves_slap_happy.name: Slap Happy
mbx.items.gloves_sticky_paws.lore: Everything sticks to them. Coins, gems, lint, regrets... Mostly coins though.
mbx.items.gloves_sticky_paws.name: Sticky Paws
mbx.items.gloves_thunder_fist.lore: Each punch sounds like a thunderclap. Neighbors have filed complaints.
mbx.items.gloves_thunder_fist.name: Thunder Fist
mbx.items.gloves_tickle_fingers.lore: Enemies can't fight back when they're laughing. Warfare at its silliest.
mbx.items.gloves_tickle_fingers.name: Tickle Fingers
mbx.items.gloves_titan_grasp.lore: Forged from a titan's knuckles. Opening jars has never been easier.

mbx.items.hammer_sledgehammer.name: Slidgehammer

mbx.items.hammershark_fin.name: Hammershark fin

mbx.items.hammershark_tooth.name: Hammershark tooth

mbx.items.harvester_bamboom.name: Bamboom

mbx.items.harvester_bamboozle.name: Bamboozle

mbx.items.harvester_berry_slicer.name: Berry slicer

mbx.items.harvester_bing_hoe.name: Bing'hoe

mbx.items.harvester_cheese.name: Brie Reaper

mbx.items.harvester_cobalt_hoe.name: Cobalt Hoe

mbx.items.harvester_fisherman_40.name: Olive Fishing Rod

mbx.items.harvester_honey.name: Honey Harvester

mbx.items.harvester_lucky_choppee.name: Lucky Choppee

mbx.items.harvester_lumberjack_40.name: Bauxite Axe

mbx.items.harvester_royal_axe.name: Royal Axe

mbx.items.harvester_royal_hoe.name: Royal Hoe

mbx.items.harvester_seacker.name: Seacker

mbx.items.harvester_valhallaxe.name: Valhallaxe

mbx.items.haversack_small.name: Small {{key0}} Haversack
mbx.items.hazelnut.lore: A delightful snack, small and crunchy, or a squirrel's treasure.
mbx.items.hazelnut.name: Hazelnut

mbx.items.healing_herb_blend.name: Healing Herb Blend

mbx.items.henbane_elixir.name: Henbane Elixir

mbx.items.herb.name: Herb

mbx.items.herbal_soup.name: Herbal Soup

mbx.items.hull_1.lore: Holds together with nails, hope, and a questionable amount of optimism.
mbx.items.hull_1.name: Oak Hull

mbx.items.hull_3.lore: The shipwright said it was unsinkable. We've heard that one before, but this time it might be true.
mbx.items.hull_3.name: Ironclad Hull
mbx.items.hull_4.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's durability.
mbx.items.hull_4.lore: Made from wood that grew at the bottom of the ocean. Don't ask how, the tree doesn't like to talk about it.
mbx.items.hull_4.name: Abyssal Hull
mbx.items.ice_cream_blueberry.lore: Berry brain boost, intelligence flows freely, think smarter, not harder!
mbx.items.ice_cream_blueberry.name: Blueberry Ice Cream
mbx.items.ice_cream_blueberry_ripple.lor: Blue ripples of brilliance, intelligence meets fortune, a rare berry blessing!

mbx.items.ice_cream_chocolate.name: Chocolate Ice Cream

mbx.items.ice_cream_raspberry_ripple.lor: Swirled raspberry wisdom, enhances mind and insight, ripple through knowledge!

mbx.items.ice_cream_rum_raisin.name: Rum Raisin Ice Cream

mbx.items.ice_cream_smurf.name: Smurf Ice Cream
mbx.items.ice_cream_strawberry.lore: Lucky strawberry charm, fortune favors the sweet, one scoop of destiny!
mbx.items.ice_cream_strawberry.name: Strawberry Ice Cream
mbx.items.ice_cream_strawberry_ripple.lo: Rippled strawberry luck, fortune and fate entwined, rare berry enchantment!

mbx.items.ice_cream_vanilla.name: Vanilla Ice Cream

mbx.items.ingot_ashstone.lore: Molten lava cooled, this ingot is hot property in crafting circles.
mbx.items.ingot_ashstone.name: Ashstone Ingot
mbx.items.ingot_bauxite.lore: Refined aluminum ingot, perfect for lightweight and shiny items.
mbx.items.ingot_bauxite.name: Bauxite Ingot
mbx.items.ingot_cobalt.lore: A sturdy blue ingot, ideal for strong and stylish gear.
mbx.items.ingot_cobalt.name: Cobalt Ingot
mbx.items.ingot_dolomite.lore: A robust and reliable ingot, dolomite is the foundation of any build.
mbx.items.ingot_dolomite.name: Dolomite Ingot
mbx.items.ingot_liquid_diamonds.lore: A luxurious ingot, liquid diamonds add a touch of class.
mbx.items.ingot_liquid_diamonds.name: Liquid Diamonds Ingot
mbx.items.ingot_manganese.lore: Strong and durable, this ingot is a smith's best friend.
mbx.items.ingot_manganese.name: Manganese Ingot
mbx.items.ingot_opale.lore: An opulent ingot, shimmering with colors and elegance.
mbx.items.ingot_opale.name: Opale Ingot
mbx.items.ingot_rainbow_stone.lore: A legendary ingot, radiating all the colors of the rainbow.
mbx.items.ingot_rainbow_stone.name: Rainbow Stone Ingot
mbx.items.ingot_raw_obsidian.lore: Unrefined and edgy, this ingot is perfect for dark crafts.
mbx.items.ingot_raw_obsidian.name: Raw Obsidian Ingot
mbx.items.ingot_seafoam.lore: An ingot that brings the calm and beauty of the sea to you.
mbx.items.ingot_seafoam.name: Seafoam Ingot
mbx.items.ingot_silicate.lore: Common yet crucial, this ingot forms the basis of many crafts.
mbx.items.ingot_silicate.name: Silicate Ingot

mbx.items.ingot_tin.lore: A shiny and soft ingot, perfect for a variety of uses.
mbx.items.ingot_tin.name: Tin Ingot
mbx.items.ingot_topaz.lore: A precious and bright ingot, topaz dazzles with its brilliance.
mbx.items.ingot_topaz.name: Topaz Ingot
mbx.items.insect_ant.lore: Small. Angry. Unionized. Marches in lines like it’s prepping for a tiny parade.
mbx.items.insect_ant.name: Ant
mbx.items.insect_ant_brown.lore: Carries 50x its weight, but still doesn’t carry the emotional burden you do.
mbx.items.insect_ant_brown.name: Brown Ant
mbx.items.insect_centipede.lore: Has so many legs it needs an Excel sheet for shoes. None are clean.
mbx.items.insect_centipede.name: Centipede
mbx.items.insect_cricket.lore: Won’t shut up at night, but disappears the moment you try to prove it.
mbx.items.insect_cricket.name: Cricket
mbx.items.insect_cyclommatus_stag.lore: Sounds like a Roman general, actually just a beetle with glorious jaws of doom.
mbx.items.insect_cyclommatus_stag.name: Cyclommatus Stag
mbx.items.insect_dragonfly_blue.lore: More aerodynamic than your WiFi, buzzes past with existential purpose, or just hunger. Who knows?
mbx.items.insect_dragonfly_blue.name: Blue Dragonfly
mbx.items.insect_dragonfly_green.lore: Stealth mode: enabled, flies like a whisper, bites like a scream.
mbx.items.insect_dragonfly_green.name: Green Dragonfly
mbx.items.insect_dragonfly_red.lore: Looks like it's on fire, flies like it owes money, vanishes like your patience.
mbx.items.insect_dragonfly_red.name: Red Dragonfly
mbx.items.insect_dragonfly_yellow.lore: Faster than gossip, louder than your thoughts, twice as annoying.
mbx.items.insect_dragonfly_yellow.name: Yellow Dragonfly
mbx.items.insect_dung_beetle.lore: Rolls poop like it’s treasure, flexes harder than gym rats, lives with zero shame.
mbx.items.insect_dung_beetle.name: Dung Beetle

mbx.items.insect_firefly.name: Firefly

mbx.items.insect_ladybug.name: Ladybug

mbx.items.insect_locust.name: Locust
mbx.items.insect_mantis.lore: Folds hands in prayer, delivers high kicks of justice, then eats its date.
mbx.items.insect_mantis.name: Mantis
mbx.items.insect_mosquito.lore: Buzzes lies into your ear, steals blood like a bank, leaves you itchy and broke.
mbx.items.insect_mosquito.name: Mosquito
mbx.items.insect_scorpion.lore: Pinches, stings, and judges, sleeps with one claw ready, fears nothing but sandals.
mbx.items.insect_scorpion.name: Scorpion
mbx.items.insect_snail.lore: Slowest racer in the garden, but always brings their house, and infinite patience.
mbx.items.insect_snail.name: Snail
mbx.items.insect_spider.lore: Weaves dreams and nightmares, eight legs of silent terror, free pest control.
mbx.items.insect_spider.name: Spider
mbx.items.insect_stick_insect.lore: Master of disguise, forgot how to move, or maybe just lazy.
mbx.items.insect_stick_insect.name: Stick Insect
mbx.items.insect_tarantula.lore: Fluffy terror on eight paws, brings screams, bites, and unexpected cuddles.
mbx.items.insect_tarantula.name: Tarantula
mbx.items.insect_wasp.lore: Hates everyone equally, shows up uninvited, leaves pain as a souvenir.
mbx.items.insect_wasp.name: Wasp
mbx.items.ironing_board.lore: Smooth out wrinkles, a household staple, reliable and steady.
mbx.items.ironing_board.name: Ironing Board
mbx.items.jelly_epic.description: A delicious jelly that allows your pet to gain additional experience points.
mbx.items.jelly_epic.name: Epic Jelly
mbx.items.jelly_legendary.description: A delicious jelly that allows your pet to gain additional experience points.
mbx.items.jelly_legendary.name: Legendary Jelly
mbx.items.jelly_mythic.description: A delicious jelly that allows your pet to gain additional experience points.
mbx.items.jelly_mythic.name: Mythic Jelly
mbx.items.jelly_rare.description: A delicious jelly that allows your pet to gain additional experience points.
mbx.items.jelly_rare.name: Rare Jelly
mbx.items.jellyfish_jelly.lore: Wobbly and sweet, a gelatinous treat, for the adventurous eater!
mbx.items.jellyfish_jelly.name: Jellyfish Jelly
mbx.items.ketchup_sauce.lore: The red hero that makes fries sing and hot dogs dance.
mbx.items.ketchup_sauce.name: Ketchup Sauce
mbx.items.key_castle.description: Can open specific doors during expeditions.
mbx.items.key_castle.lore: Old iron key. Fits some castle locks. Useful in expeditions.
mbx.items.key_castle.name: Castle key
mbx.items.key_common.lore: Opens common treasures, for common finds, use it wisely.
mbx.items.key_common.name: Common Key
mbx.items.key_epic.lore: Unlocks epic treasures, loot fit for heroes, don't lose it.
mbx.items.key_epic.name: Epic Key
mbx.items.key_goblin.description: Can open the treasure vault of the goblin warren.
mbx.items.key_goblin.lore: Looted from a fallen drake. Crusted with goblin gold. Found in goblin expeditions.
mbx.items.key_goblin.name: Goblin key
mbx.items.key_legendary.lore: Unlocks legendary treasures of untold value.
mbx.items.key_legendary.name: Legendary Key
mbx.items.key_mythic.lore: Unlocks mythic treasures, holding ancient legendary rewards.
mbx.items.key_mythic.name: Mythic Key
mbx.items.key_nether.description: Can open the sealed door to the nether sanctum.
mbx.items.key_nether.lore: Forged in dragonfire. Glows faintly with ash. Found in nether chests.
mbx.items.key_nether.name: Nether key
mbx.items.key_orc.description: Can open the sealed vault of the orc warlord.
mbx.items.key_orc.lore: Torn from a giant's belt. Heavy, crude iron. Found in orc expeditions.
mbx.items.key_orc.name: Orc key
mbx.items.key_pyramid.description: Can open the hidden tomb of the pyramid depths.
mbx.items.key_pyramid.lore: Pried from a mummified hand. Etched with ancient glyphs. Found in pyramid expeditions.
mbx.items.key_pyramid.name: Pyramid key
mbx.items.key_rare.lore: Unlocks rare treasures, holding hidden gems, guard it carefully.
mbx.items.key_rare.name: Rare Key
mbx.items.key_rusty_safe.description: Can open specific safes during expeditions.
mbx.items.key_rusty_safe.lore: Rusty but reliable. Opens old safes. Found in expeditions.
mbx.items.key_rusty_safe.name: Rusty Safe key
mbx.items.key_uncommon.lore: Unlocks uncommon finds, a step up from the usual loot.
mbx.items.key_uncommon.name: Uncommon Key
mbx.items.kibble_beef_mash.lore: Mashed so smooth, even cows are jealous of its creamy goodness.
mbx.items.kibble_beef_mash.name: Beef Mash
mbx.items.kibble_carrot_and_melon_mash.l: A colorful duo, bringing their A-game to the vegetable mashup stage.
mbx.items.kibble_chicken_mash.lore: Fluffy clouds of chicken, ready to cluck their way onto your plate.
mbx.items.kibble_chicken_mash.name: Chicken Mash
mbx.items.kibble_fish_mash.lore: Mermaids' favorite comfort food, this dish is the true catch of the day.
mbx.items.kibble_fish_mash.name: Fish Mash
mbx.items.kibble_honey.lore: Sweet enough to glue your teeth together. Great for sticky situations.
mbx.items.kibble_honey.name: Honey Mash
mbx.items.kibble_lemon.lore: So sour it insults your taste buds. Pairs great with regret. Pucker up, buttercup.
mbx.items.kibble_lemon.name: Lemon Mash
mbx.items.kibble_olive_beetroot_mash.lor: The unlikely duo no one asked for. Earthy meets... whatever this is. At least it’s colorful.
mbx.items.kibble_pepper.lore: Sets your tongue ablaze. Regret is immediate. Perfect for spice masochists.
mbx.items.kibble_pepper.name: Pepper Mash
mbx.items.kibble_potato_and_chicken_mash: The spud and bird combo that’ll mash its way into your heart.
mbx.items.kibble_rabbit_mash.lore: Hopping straight onto your plate, this mash brings the bounce with every bite.
mbx.items.kibble_rabbit_mash.name: Rabbit Mash
mbx.items.kibble_rice_and_chicken_mash.l: A cozy bowlful of carbs and clucks, making every spoonful a winner.
mbx.items.kibble_squash_and_beef_mash.lo: Mash of legends, where squash and beef duke it out for flavor supremacy.
mbx.items.kibble_turkey_and_rice_mash.lo: Thanksgiving's secret weapon, this mash gobbles its way into your taste buds.
mbx.items.kibble_vegetable_mash.lore: Veggie lovers unite! This mashup turns greens into pure joy.
mbx.items.kibble_vegetable_mash.name: Vegetable Mash
mbx.items.kraken_ink_vial.lore: Inky darkness, from the deep sea, a writer's dream.
mbx.items.kraken_ink_vial.name: Kraken Ink Vial
mbx.items.kraken_ring.lore: A mythical morsel, with a chewy bite, dare to devour!
mbx.items.kraken_ring.name: Kraken Ring
mbx.items.laborer_cheddar.lore: Dig holes, bury cheese, or flatten the ground, versatile tool for all occasions!
mbx.items.laborer_cheddar.name: Cheddar Spade
mbx.items.laborer_cheese.lore: Level with cheese precision, unearth dairy secrets, flatten your enemies in fondue!
mbx.items.laborer_cheese.name: Feta Digger
mbx.items.laborer_earthshaker.lore: Forged from the grumbles of a thousand earthquakes, it's guaranteed to rock your world!
mbx.items.laborer_earthshaker.name: Earthshaker
mbx.items.laborer_laborynth.lore: Crafted deep within the ancient pyramid of puzzles, it's a-maze-ing at finding solutions!
mbx.items.laborer_laborynth.name: Laborynth
mbx.items.laughing_tree_sculpture.lore: Joyful and jolly, crafted with humor, a tree's spirit.
mbx.items.laughing_tree_sculpture.name: Laughing Tree Sculpture
mbx.items.lava_infused_chili.lore: So hot, it'll make you sneeze fire. Handle with extreme caution.
mbx.items.lava_infused_chili.name: Lava-Infused Chili
mbx.items.leaf_blower.lore: Finally, wind does damage. Mostly to your credibility. But hey, leaves fear you now.
mbx.items.leaf_blower.name: Leaf Blower
mbx.items.lemon.lore: A burst of citrus brightness, sharp and zesty, awakening the senses.
mbx.items.lemon.name: Lemon
mbx.items.lily_bottle.lore: Pure and serene, this lily essence is a calming potion.
mbx.items.lily_bottle.name: Lily Bottle
mbx.items.liquid_diamond.lore: A rare and valuable substance, liquid diamonds are pure luxury.
mbx.items.liquid_diamond.name: Liquid Diamond
mbx.items.little_knight_belt.lore: For the brave little warrior in you, adds a touch of valor.
mbx.items.little_knight_belt.name: Little Knight Belt
mbx.items.little_knight_boots.lore: March with courage tiny but mighty in every step.
mbx.items.little_knight_boots.name: Little Knight Boots
mbx.items.little_knight_chestplate.lore: Sturdy and strong crafted for small heroes defend with honor.
mbx.items.little_knight_chestplate.name: Little Knight Chestplate
mbx.items.little_knight_helmet.lore: Protect your head with knightly charm for brave adventures.
mbx.items.little_knight_helmet.name: Little Knight Helmet
mbx.items.little_knight_leggings.lore: Run into battle with knightly grace and swift moves.
mbx.items.little_knight_leggings.name: Little Knight Leggings
mbx.items.little_knight_necklace.lore: For the brave little warrior, adds a touch of valor and courage.
mbx.items.little_knight_necklace.name: Little Knight Necklace
mbx.items.little_knight_ring.lore: For the pint-sized hero, keeps courage high and naps even higher.
mbx.items.little_knight_ring.name: Little Knight Ring
mbx.items.little_knight_sword.lore: Small but determined, it dreams of slaying giants twice its size.
mbx.items.little_knight_sword.name: Little Knight Sword
mbx.items.lny_envelope.lore: A symbol of luck and joy. Given with love, received with glee, and spent before the night is over.
mbx.items.lny_envelope.name: {{key0}} Envelope
mbx.items.lny_snake_backpack.lore: Carries your burdens lightly, yet whispers advice you may not want to hear.
mbx.items.lny_snake_backpack.name: Wood Snake Tail
mbx.items.lny_snake_belt.lore: Wraps around you like destiny. Loose enough for comfort, tight enough for control.
mbx.items.lny_snake_belt.name: Wood Snake Belt
mbx.items.lny_snake_boots.lore: Silent as a snake in the grass, swift as the wind through trees. Ideal for avoiding fate… or embracing it.
mbx.items.lny_snake_boots.name: Wood Snake Boots
mbx.items.lny_snake_chestplate.lore: Not made of metal, but wisdom. Shields the body, but tests the mind.
mbx.items.lny_snake_chestplate.name: Wood Snake Chestplate
mbx.items.lny_snake_crate.lore: A treasure blessed by the wisdom of the Wood Snake. Open it... if fate allows.
mbx.items.lny_snake_crate.name: Wood Snake's Treasure
mbx.items.lny_snake_helmet.lore: A helm shaped by nature's hand. Grants insight and strategy, if you can handle the whispers.
mbx.items.lny_snake_helmet.name: Wood Snake Head
mbx.items.lny_snake_leggings.lore: Made from enchanted bark and silk. Light, flexible, and ever-shifting, like the path of wisdom.
mbx.items.lny_snake_leggings.name: Wood Snake Leggings
mbx.items.lny_snake_necklace.lore: A talisman of balance and patience. Wears down fools, but strengthens the wise.
mbx.items.lny_snake_necklace.name: Wood Snake Necklace
mbx.items.lny_snake_ring.lore: A ring without end, a reminder that wisdom, like time, is cyclical.
mbx.items.lny_snake_ring.name: Wood Snake Ring
mbx.items.log_banana.lore: Solid yet slippery, a wooden prankster's best friend.
mbx.items.log_banana.name: Banana Log
mbx.items.log_chestnut.lore: Autumn's embrace, sturdy and warm, in every grain.
mbx.items.log_chestnut.name: Chestnut Log
mbx.items.log_coconut.lore: Sturdy and reliable, perfect for tropical construction.
mbx.items.log_coconut.name: Coconut Log
mbx.items.log_dark_coconut.lore: A secret keeper, mystic and solid, in tropical woods.
mbx.items.log_dark_coconut.name: Dark Coconut Log
mbx.items.log_elm.lore: Nature's pillar, graceful and tall, of strength and beauty.
mbx.items.log_elm.name: Elm Log
mbx.items.log_eucalyptus.lore: Keeps pests away, fresh and aromatic, nature's healer.
mbx.items.log_eucalyptus.name: Eucalyptus Log
mbx.items.log_hazel.lore: A magician's wand, light and flexible, in the making.
mbx.items.log_hazel.name: Hazel Log
mbx.items.log_laughing_tree.lore: Giggles in the breeze, whispers in the wind, nature's jester.
mbx.items.log_laughing_tree.name: Laughing Tree Log
mbx.items.log_mahogany.lore: Waterlogged but strong, from the depths, a builder's choice.
mbx.items.log_mahogany.name: Mahogany Log
mbx.items.log_maple.lore: A syrupy delight, smooth and bright, in wooden form.
mbx.items.log_maple.name: Maple Log
mbx.items.log_mystic_hornbeam.lore: A spellcaster's dream, enchanted and rare, in every ring.
mbx.items.log_mystic_hornbeam.name: Mystic Hornbeam Log
mbx.items.log_olive_tree.lore: A symbol of peace, ancient and wise, and longevity.
mbx.items.log_olive_tree.name: Olive Tree Log
mbx.items.log_sacred_coconut.lore: A divine creation, hallowed and strong, in tropical groves.
mbx.items.log_sacred_coconut.name: Sacred Coconut Log
mbx.items.log_walnut.lore: A craftsman's delight, dark and dense, in every cut.
mbx.items.log_walnut.name: Walnut Log
mbx.items.log_yew.lore: A bowyer's choice, ancient and powerful, through centuries.
mbx.items.log_yew.name: Yew Log
mbx.items.loose_circuit_chip.lore: Looks like outdated tech. Probably important in the past. Now just a relic.
mbx.items.loose_circuit_chip.name: Loose Circuit Chip
mbx.items.lotus_infused_tea_bag.lore: Brew for wisdom. Tastes like flowers, or regret.
mbx.items.lotus_infused_tea_bag.name: Lotus-Infused Tea Bag
mbx.items.love_potion_big.lore: A bold brew of romance, one sip sparks passion, two sips invite obsession.
mbx.items.love_potion_big.name: Grand Love Elixir
mbx.items.love_potion_blue.lore: Cool, calming, and sweet, it soothes hearts, or freezes them in longing.
mbx.items.love_potion_blue.name: Azure Love Potion
mbx.items.love_potion_red.lore: A fiery infusion of desire, burns with intensity, and lingers like a scar.
mbx.items.love_potion_red.name: Crimson Love Potion
mbx.items.love_potion_yellow.lore: Warm, bright, and playful, fills the heart with joy, but fades faster than expected.
mbx.items.love_potion_yellow.name: Golden Love Potion
mbx.items.luck_boost_1.description: Place in a building's luck slot to increase rare resource chances.
mbx.items.luck_boost_1.lore: A rabbit donated its foot for this. Voluntarily, he says. The rabbit says otherwise.
mbx.items.luck_boost_1.name: Basic Luck Boost
mbx.items.luck_boost_2.description: Place in a building's luck slot to greatly increase rare resource chances.
mbx.items.luck_boost_2.lore: Distilled from the sweat of a gambler on a twelve-game winning streak. Still warm.
mbx.items.luck_boost_2.name: Enhanced Luck Boost
mbx.items.luck_boost_3.description: Place in a building's luck slot to massively increase rare resource chances.
mbx.items.luck_boost_3.lore: Contains actual stardust. Or glitter. The alchemist couldn't tell the difference.
mbx.items.luck_boost_3.name: Superior Luck Boost
mbx.items.lucky_jester_boots.lore: Stride in luck each footfall charmed luck's on your side.
mbx.items.lucky_jester_boots.name: Lucky Jester Boots
mbx.items.lucky_jester_chestplate.lore: Charm and wit protect your heart with luck's embrace.
mbx.items.lucky_jester_chestplate.name: Lucky Jester Chestplate
mbx.items.lucky_jester_helmet.lore: Smile of fortune beneath this hat luck follows you.
mbx.items.lucky_jester_helmet.name: Lucky Jester Helmet
mbx.items.lucky_jester_leggings.lore: Prance with luck every step blessed by fortune's grace.
mbx.items.lucky_jester_leggings.name: Lucky Jester Leggings
mbx.items.lucky_jester_wand.lore: Luck on your side, though its loyalty shifts faster than a joke.
mbx.items.lucky_jester_wand.name: Lucky Jester Wand
mbx.items.mage_backpack.lore: Lined with spell pockets, mostly used for snacks, and smells faintly of ozone.
mbx.items.mage_backpack.name: Magus Robe
mbx.items.mage_helmet.lore: Pointy on top even pointier inside fits any ego perfectly.
mbx.items.mage_helmet.name: Magus Mitre
mbx.items.mage_staff.lore: Cracked twice, sparks only on Tuesdays, and is mostly hot air.
mbx.items.mage_staff.name: Magus Wand
mbx.items.magic_blue_dye.lore: Enchanted blue, this dye adds a touch of magic.
mbx.items.magic_blue_dye.name: Magic Blue Dye
mbx.items.magic_green_dye.lore: Enchanted green, this dye infuses items with nature's touch.
mbx.items.magic_green_dye.name: Magic Green Dye
mbx.items.magic_leaf_essence.lore: From enchanted leaves, this essence brings nature's power.
mbx.items.magic_leaf_essence.name: Magic Leaf Essence
mbx.items.magician_crab_stick.lore: Abracadabra! One wave of this stick, and poof, a crab disappears.
mbx.items.magician_crab_stick.name: Magician crab stick
mbx.items.magician_grab_claw.lore: Grasp the impossible, with a touch of magic, that's the crab trick!
mbx.items.magician_grab_claw.name: Magician grab claw
mbx.items.magma_slime_gel.lore: Spicy enough to melt your tongue, but you'll still ask for seconds.
mbx.items.magma_slime_gel.name: Magma Slime Gel
mbx.items.mahogany_carving_block.lore: Crafted from the sea, perfect for artisans, carving wonders.
mbx.items.mahogany_carving_block.name: Mahogany Carving Block
mbx.items.mammoth_hairball.lore: Unravel the mystery, or just sneeze a lot. Hairballs, not for the faint-hearted.
mbx.items.mammoth_hairball.name: Mammoth Hairball
mbx.items.mandarinfish_medley.lore: A medley of colors, bursting with flavor, a feast for the eyes and taste buds!
mbx.items.mandarinfish_medley.name: Mandarinfish Medley
mbx.items.mandrake_elixir.lore: Beware the scream, this elixir holds the mandrake's magic.
mbx.items.mandrake_elixir.name: Mandrake Elixir
mbx.items.manganese_bar.lore: A bar of sheer strength, perfect for reinforcing anything.
mbx.items.manganese_bar.name: Manganese Bar
mbx.items.mango.lore: A treasure of golden flesh, ripe with sweet temptation, but sticky hands are inevitable.
mbx.items.mango.name: Mango
mbx.items.maple_syrup.lore: Sweet and sticky, from maple trees, a sugary delight.
mbx.items.maple_syrup.name: Maple Syrup
mbx.items.mast_1.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's speed.
mbx.items.mast_1.lore: Just a big stick with a blanket on it. Somehow, that's enough to cross entire oceans. Engineering is wild.
mbx.items.mast_1.name: Wooden Mast
mbx.items.mast_2.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's speed.
mbx.items.mast_2.lore: Survived three storms and a seagull attack. The seagull was honestly the scariest part.
mbx.items.mast_2.name: Sturdy Mast
mbx.items.mast_3.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's speed.
mbx.items.mast_3.lore: So tall, the crow's nest gets its own weather forecast. Cloudy with a chance of vertigo.
mbx.items.mast_3.name: Grand Mast
mbx.items.mast_4.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's speed.
mbx.items.mast_4.lore: They cut down a world tree for this. The druids are still sending strongly worded letters.
mbx.items.mast_4.name: Titan Mast
mbx.items.mast_5.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's speed.
mbx.items.mast_5.lore: Woven from starlight and held together by sheer audacity. The wind doesn't push it — it politely asks permission.
mbx.items.mast_5.name: Celestial Mast
mbx.items.mayonnaise_sauce.lore: Creamy, dreamy, and ready to spread joy on every sandwich.
mbx.items.mayonnaise_sauce.name: Mayonnaise Sauce
mbx.items.meat_ball.lore: Round, meaty, and ready to roll right into your stomach.
mbx.items.meat_ball.name: Meat Ball
mbx.items.meat_sausage.lore: A tubular wonder of flavors, perfect for when you're feeling bratty.
mbx.items.meat_sausage.name: Meat Sausage
mbx.items.melon_sliced_in_a_bowl.lore: Slices so juicy, they’ll make you question if you need a boat.
mbx.items.melon_sliced_in_a_bowl.name: Sliced Melon Bowl
mbx.items.melted_candle.lore: Lit its last flame a long time ago. Now it's just fancy wax.
mbx.items.melted_candle.name: Melted Candle
mbx.items.microphone.lore: Speak loud and clear, or just use it for karaoke.
mbx.items.microphone.name: Microphone
mbx.items.mixed_fruit_salad.lore: The best fruit party, where everyone is invited to the bowl of fun.
mbx.items.mixed_fruit_salad.name: Mixed Fruit Salad
mbx.items.mm-alchemist_potion_shelf.lore: Bubbling, glowing, and probably slightly illegal in three dimensions.
mbx.items.mm-alchemist_potion_shelf.name: Alchemist's Potion Shelf
mbx.items.mm-alchemist_wooden_counter.lo: Covered in stains, spills, and one very angry mushroom that won't stop yelling.
mbx.items.mm-animated_fan.lore: Keeps air moving, and dust circulating like a lazy tornado.
mbx.items.mm-animated_fan.name: Fan
mbx.items.mm-animated_fan2.lore: Spins fast, hums loud, and threatens to fly off at any moment.
mbx.items.mm-animated_fan2.name: Ceiling Fan
mbx.items.mm-atm_green.description: Access your personal bank account directly from your island.
mbx.items.mm-atm_green.lore: Withdraw your hopes, deposit your regrets, green means go broke faster.
mbx.items.mm-atm_green.name: Bank ATM
mbx.items.mm-auction_table.description: Opens the auction house menu directly from your island.
mbx.items.mm-auction_table.lore: Place your bids, lose your coins, and maybe your dignity.
mbx.items.mm-auction_table.name: Auction Table
mbx.items.mm-autel_banner.lore: Waves with holy grace, unless it's windy, then it just slaps pilgrims.
mbx.items.mm-autel_banner.name: Sacred Altar Banner
mbx.items.mm-axe_in_log.lore: Someone started chopping, then remembered they had Netflix and left.
mbx.items.mm-axe_in_log.name: Axe in Log
mbx.items.mm-baguette_furniture.lore: Crispy on the outside, fluffy on the inside, gone in five minutes.
mbx.items.mm-baguette_furniture.name: Baguette
mbx.items.mm-barrel_blue.lore: Contains blue stuff. Maybe magic, maybe dye, maybe blueberry soup.
mbx.items.mm-barrel_blue.name: Blue Barrel
mbx.items.mm-barrel_green.lore: It glows faintly at night. That's totally fine, right?
mbx.items.mm-barrel_green.name: Green Barrel
mbx.items.mm-barrel_red.lore: Not explosive, unless you *really* believe in video game clichés.
mbx.items.mm-barrel_red.name: Red Barrel
mbx.items.mm-bazaar_table.description: Opens the global bazaar menu from your island instantly.
mbx.items.mm-bazaar_table.lore: Where prices fluctuate, logic disappears, and everyone thinks they're a trader.
mbx.items.mm-bazaar_table.name: Bazaar Table
mbx.items.mm-beach_ball.lore: Bounces endlessly until someone breaks a window and blames the dog.
mbx.items.mm-beach_ball.name: Colorful Beach Ball
mbx.items.mm-beach_umbrella.lore: Blocks 100% of sun, and 0% of sand in your sandwiches.
mbx.items.mm-beach_umbrella.name: Striped Beach Umbrella
mbx.items.mm-big_monitor.lore: Big enough to watch a dragon fight in 4K, and still lose.
mbx.items.mm-big_monitor.name: Oversized Computer Monitor
mbx.items.mm-black_sofa.lore: Swallows you whole after 30 minutes of sitting, and your will to move.
mbx.items.mm-black_sofa.name: Comfy Black Sofa
mbx.items.mm-black_wheelchair.lore: Smooth, looks sharp, and somehow still faster than most NPCs (no it's a sofa).

mbx.items.mm-paint_last_supper.lore: Thirteen men share their final meal. Betrayal whispers between bread and wine. Hands frozen in dramatic revelation. A moment before faith is tested. Sacred tension across the long table.

mbx.items.mm-paint_mona_lisa.lore: A smile that hides as much as it reveals. Eyes that follow with silent mystery. Painted by the master of the Renaissance. Shrouded in myth, stolen and recovered. She watches centuries pass, unmoved.

mbx.items.mm-paint_pearl_girl.lore: She turns, a whisper of a moment. Lips parted, caught in mid-thought. The pearl gleams with quiet mystery. Timeless grace in soft light. A silent muse framed forever.

mbx.items.mm-paint_scream.lore: A face warped by inner terror. The sky bleeds, the soul collapses. Existential dread in a single moment. Brushstrokes echo a silent cry. Alone, but screaming to the world.
mbx.items.mm-paint_scream.name: "The Scream" - Edvard Munch
mbx.items.mm-paint_son_of_man.lore: A face hidden by a floating apple. Identity veiled in plain sight. A bowler hat, a surreal gaze. Reality bent by quiet absurdity. He stares without showing himself.

mbx.items.monkfish_nuggets.lore: Crunchy and tender, bite-sized delight, a nugget of joy.
mbx.items.monkfish_nuggets.name: Monkfish Nuggets
mbx.items.moorish_idol_sashimi.lore: Raw elegance, sliced to perfection, a true ocean's gem.
mbx.items.moorish_idol_sashimi.name: Moorish Idol Sashimi
mbx.items.moskito_wing_dust.lore: Finely ground wings. Just looking at it makes you itch. Avoid at all costs.
mbx.items.moskito_wing_dust.name: Mosquito Wing Dust
mbx.items.mosquito_wings.lore: Buzzing annoyance captured. May still cause irritation. Avoid at all costs.
mbx.items.mosquito_wings.name: Mosquito Wings

mbx.items.mount_broomstick.lore: Flies. Barely. Smells like old socks and regret. Great for witches and janitors alike.
mbx.items.mount_broomstick.name: Sweep
mbx.items.mount_cloud.lore: Syncs with the skies and your mood. Lightning-fast, but sometimes glitchy. Great for soaring... until it disconnects.
mbx.items.mount_cloud.name: High Cloud
mbx.items.mount_default.lore: Majestic in its own mind. Short legs, long gallops (kind of). Not the brightest saddle in the shed.
mbx.items.mount_default.name: Dumbhoof
mbx.items.mount_flying_carpet.lore: Smooth, silent, and magical. Perfect for grand entrances or sneaky rooftop escapes.
mbx.items.mount_flying_carpet.name: Flying Carpet
mbx.items.mount_grumrock.lore: A living boulder, perpetually annoyed, but rolls where you need it.
mbx.items.mount_grumrock.name: Grumrock
mbx.items.mount_hipster_bike.lore: Handcrafted with irony. More style than speed. Comes with a free organic coffee.
mbx.items.mount_hipster_bike.name: Hipster bike
mbx.items.mount_hornox.lore: Stubborn, horned, and heavy. Will carry you... eventually. Doesn't do Mondays.
mbx.items.mount_hornox.name: Hornox
mbx.items.mount_lny_snake.lore: An ancient red serpent, soaring through the skies, carrying you… if it deems you worthy.
mbx.items.mount_lny_snake.name: Lunar Crimson Snake
mbx.items.mount_motorcycle.lore: Vroom vroom! The roar drowns out your internal doubts. Perfect for midlife crises.
mbx.items.mount_motorcycle.name: Thunderbike
mbx.items.mount_panda.lore: Wide load incoming. Rockets fueled by bamboo power. Slow, then kaboom.
mbx.items.mount_panda.name: Bamboo Blaster
mbx.items.mount_paperplane.lore: Flimsy and wobbly. Flies if you breathe right. Paper, not included.
mbx.items.mount_paperplane.name: Paperplane
mbx.items.mount_puddle.lore: Mostly liquid. Squeaks... and splashes. Cult-approved. Somehow.
mbx.items.mount_puddle.name: Sloshrat
mbx.items.mount_rocket.lore: Reaches orbit. Sometimes... unintentionally. Hang on tight (or don't).
mbx.items.mount_rocket.name: Boomstick 9000
mbx.items.mount_shadow_dragon.lore: Wreathed in eternal moping, claims it is misunderstood, definitely listens to vinyl.
mbx.items.mount_shadow_dragon.name: Edgelord
mbx.items.mount_shark.lore: Fully mechanical jaws. Terrifies fish and tourists alike. Now with 50% less rust!
mbx.items.mount_shark.name: Sharktron MK-II
mbx.items.mount_shopping_cart.lore: Wheel wobbles like crazy. Goes faster downhill than intended. Pure panic and bargains.

mbx.items.mount_skyreign.name: Skyreign
mbx.items.mount_truck.lore: It's loud. It's huge. It's stupid. Crushes everything in its path. Because subtlety is overrated.
mbx.items.mount_truck.name: Truckzilla
mbx.items.mount_ufo.lore: Spins and stares. Flexes on gravity. No seatbelt required.
mbx.items.mount_ufo.name: Blorbo
mbx.items.mount_valentine_pegase.lore: Majestic and romantic, but a little too clingy, and vengeful if you break its heart.
mbx.items.mount_valentine_pegase.name: Love-struck Pegasus
mbx.items.mount_witch_broom.lore: Warning: no brakes no seatbelt, use at your own risk.
mbx.items.mount_witch_broom.name: Turbo Broom

mbx.items.mount_wooden_plane.name: Splinterwing
mbx.items.mud_mask.lore: Apply for smoother skin, and a small defense boost. Beauty in the mud.

mbx.items.mushroom_boots.name: Mushroom Boots

mbx.items.mushroom_helmet.lore: Think like a genius under this cap don't let the spores get to you.
mbx.items.mushroom_helmet.name: Mushroom Helmet
mbx.items.mushroom_leggings.lore: Run with brilliance and a dash of luck watch out for toadstools.
mbx.items.mushroom_leggings.name: Mushroom Leggings

mbx.items.musket_banana_blaster.name: Banana Blaster

mbx.items.musket_blunderblast.name: Blunderblast
mbx.items.musket_bubble_trouble.lore: Blows enemies away. Bubbles of doom. Soap up your foes.
mbx.items.musket_bubble_trouble.name: Bubble Trouble
mbx.items.musket_bubblegum_blaster.lore: Chews up enemies. Sticky situation galore. Pops foes like bubbles.
mbx.items.musket_bubblegum_blaster.name: Bubblegum Blaster
mbx.items.musket_candy_cannon.lore: Sweet, sweet defeat. Sugar-coated shots. A treat of a beat.
mbx.items.musket_candy_cannon.name: Candy Cannon
mbx.items.musket_corn_cannon.lore: Pop goes the enemy. Grainy demise. Butter ‘em up!
mbx.items.musket_corn_cannon.name: Corn Cannon
mbx.items.musket_featherweight_firearm.l: Light, deadly, fancy. So light, you'll float. But packs a punch!
mbx.items.musket_jack_in_the_blast.lore: Surprise pops. Cranks up chaos. Pop and boom!
mbx.items.musket_jack_in_the_blast.name: Jack-in-the-Blast
mbx.items.musket_mail_storm.lore: Special delivery! Postage-paid pain. Signed, sealed, doomed.
mbx.items.musket_mail_storm.name: Mail Storm
mbx.items.musket_noodle_nuisance.lore: Pastas their prime. Tangles of pasta pain. Al dente doom.
mbx.items.musket_noodle_nuisance.name: Noodle Nuisance
mbx.items.musket_pepper_popper.lore: Spices up the fight. Peppery shots! Too hot to handle.
mbx.items.musket_pepper_popper.name: Pepper Popper
mbx.items.musket_quackbuss.lore: Fires with a quack! Duck-themed doom. Quack attack!
mbx.items.musket_quackbuss.name: Quackbuss
mbx.items.musket_soda_sprayer.lore: Fizzy defeat. Carbonation overload. Pop, fizz, kaboom.
mbx.items.musket_soda_sprayer.name: Soda Sprayer
mbx.items.musket_time_turner.lore: Clock 'em up. Timely shots. Stopwatch precision.
mbx.items.musket_time_turner.name: Time Turner
mbx.items.musket_trombone_troubler.lore: Out of tune. Hurtful notes. Sound of pain.
mbx.items.musket_trombone_troubler.name: Trombone Troubler
mbx.items.mutton_beef_duo.lore: A duo so dynamic, they sing harmonies on your taste buds.

mbx.items.mutton_kebab.lore: Skewered to perfection, each bite is a journey to flavor town.
mbx.items.mutton_kebab.name: Mutton Kebab

mbx.items.mystery_furball.name: Mystery Furball
mbx.items.mystic_flower_petal.lore: A petal of power, this holds the flower's magic.
mbx.items.mystic_flower_petal.name: Mystic Flower Petal
mbx.items.mystic_herb_mix.lore: A mix of mystic herbs, perfect for brewing potions.
mbx.items.mystic_herb_mix.name: Mystic Herb Mix

mbx.items.mystic_treasure_medley.name: Mystic Treasure Medley

mbx.items.nameplate.name: Ornament

mbx.items.pet_birb_blue.name: Blue Birb
mbx.items.pet_birb_green.lore: Thinks hiding in leaves makes it a ninja, then sneezes and ruins everything.
mbx.items.pet_birb_green.name: Green Birb
mbx.items.pet_birb_orange.lore: Convinced it's on fire, screeches dramatically, and forgets it can fly.
mbx.items.pet_birb_orange.name: Orange Birb
mbx.items.pet_birb_purple.lore: Speaks only in riddles, gets confused by its own words, and blames society.
mbx.items.pet_birb_purple.name: Purple Birb
mbx.items.pet_birb_red.lore: Is pure rage, compressed into feathers, and fueled by spite.
mbx.items.pet_birb_red.name: Red Birb
mbx.items.pet_birb_yellow.lore: Thinks everything is exciting, even your boots, especially your boots.
mbx.items.pet_birb_yellow.name: Yellow Birb
mbx.items.pet_black_cat.lore: Cross its path and you'll either get cursed, or just a lot of adorable meows.
mbx.items.pet_black_cat.name: Black Cat
mbx.items.pet_cheese_mouse.lore: Always on the hunt for cheese. Give it a snack, or it'll nibble your toes.
mbx.items.pet_cheese_mouse.name: Cheese Mouse
mbx.items.pet_dragon.lore: Half lizard and half conviction, breathes fire only when alone, definitely has trust issues.
mbx.items.pet_dragon.name: Smolder
mbx.items.pet_egg.description: Incubate this egg in an Incubator Block to hatch it into your future companion.
mbx.items.pet_egg.lore: Warm, round, full of mystery. Could be a dragon. Could be an omelette. Don't sit on it. We tried. It cracks.
mbx.items.pet_egg.name: Pet Egg
mbx.items.pet_fat_shiba.lore: So round, so fluffy, yet runs faster than your average donut-eating knight.
mbx.items.pet_fat_shiba.name: Fat Shiba
mbx.items.pet_fire_dog.lore: With a bark that sizzles, this pup can roast marshmallows with just a wag of its tail.
mbx.items.pet_fire_dog.name: Fire Dog
mbx.items.pet_founder_parrot.name: Parrot
mbx.items.pet_ginger_fox.lore: Cunning, sly, and absolutely flawless in stealing hearts and the last cookie.
mbx.items.pet_ginger_fox.name: Ginger Fox
mbx.items.pet_halloween_candy.lore: Besides looking horrific, this will spike your blood sugar
mbx.items.pet_halloween_candy.name: Can'tdy
mbx.items.pet_halloween_mummy.lore: He brought some balloons for you. What a nice guy.
mbx.items.pet_halloween_mummy.name: Bummy
mbx.items.pet_hipster_penguin.lore: Wears a scarf indoors. Judges your choice of fish. Too cool to waddle with the crowd.
mbx.items.pet_hipster_penguin.name: Hipster Penguin
mbx.items.pet_lizard.lore: Naps in the sun for hours, blinks at you suspiciously, still smarter than the dog.
mbx.items.pet_lizard.name: Loafer
mbx.items.pet_lny_snake.lore: A tiny celestial serpent, floating gracefully behind you, judging your every decision.
mbx.items.pet_lny_snake.name: Lunar Snake
mbx.items.pet_mimic.lore: Looks like a chest. Eats like a chest. Is definitely not a chest.
mbx.items.pet_mimic.name: Chompy
mbx.items.pet_mini_turtle.lore: Slow and steady, but don't be surprised when it outpaces your grandest horse!
mbx.items.pet_mini_turtle.name: Mini Turtle
mbx.items.pet_orc.lore: Smashes first, thinks never. Surprisingly loyal though, if you survive the handshake.
mbx.items.pet_orc.name: Grunk
mbx.items.pet_owl.lore: Hoots cryptic riddles past midnight, pretends to know everything, mostly stares judgmentally.
mbx.items.pet_owl.name: Whoo-Cares
mbx.items.pet_panda.lore: Master of bamboo smashing, this panda also excels in napping anywhere, anytime.
mbx.items.pet_panda.name: Panda
mbx.items.pet_polar_bear.lore: Cold, fluffy, and dangerous. Cuddle it at your own risk, but watch out for snowballs!
mbx.items.pet_polar_bear.name: Polar Bear
mbx.items.pet_pot_golem.lore: A flowerpot with legs, convinced the fern is in charge, and honestly, it might be.
mbx.items.pet_pot_golem.name: Dirtbrain
mbx.items.pet_potboy.lore: A tiny pot with big dreams. Wobbles around cheerfully, and everyone loves him. Everyone.
mbx.items.pet_potboy.name: Potboy
mbx.items.pet_puddle.lore: Mostly water. Occasionally cube-shaped. Wobbles with purpose.
mbx.items.pet_puddle.name: Sploosh
mbx.items.pet_rabbit.lore: Steals carrots fast. Nibbles, then vanishes. Leaves chaos and crumbs.
mbx.items.pet_rabbit.name: Nibbit
mbx.items.pet_robot.lore: Prototype lost in time, powered by spite and static, still loading emotions.
mbx.items.pet_skeleton.lore: No muscles, no problem. Still swings a sword better than most of the living.
mbx.items.pet_skeleton.name: Rattles
mbx.items.pet_skull.lore: Rattles when excited, laughs at bad jokes, and forgets where its body went.
mbx.items.pet_skull.name: Skully
mbx.items.pet_skull_crab.lore: Found a skull one day, moved in without asking, and now charges rent.
mbx.items.pet_skull_crab.name: Crusty
mbx.items.pet_slimy.lore: A green blob of... something, pretending to be dangerous, but mostly just squishy.
mbx.items.pet_slimy.name: Globbo
mbx.items.pet_snowman.lore: Smiles through every blizzard. Knows 10 ways to avoid melting. Chilly, cheerful, and surprisingly durable.
mbx.items.pet_snowman.name: Frosty Snowman
mbx.items.pet_soot.lore: Was once a fire spirit, forgot its purpose, and just vibes in corners.
mbx.items.pet_soot.name: Smudge
mbx.items.pet_swordseye.lore: A sentient sword with a single eye. Sees all threats, blocks most of them, and judges your combat style.
mbx.items.pet_swordseye.name: Aegis Blade
mbx.items.pet_trunky.lore: Tiny tree trunk, big lumberjack energy, snaps if you sneeze too hard.
mbx.items.pet_trunky.name: Twigsy
mbx.items.pet_valentine_cupidon.lore: Shoots arrows of love, but has terrible aim, so good luck with that.
mbx.items.pet_valentine_cupidon.name: Stupidon
mbx.items.pet_valentine_heart.lore: Tiny, bouncy, and way too enthusiastic about love, until it gets heartbroken.
mbx.items.pet_valentine_heart.name: Lovebug Heart
mbx.items.pet_white_cat.lore: Pure as snow, but causes mischief like a tornado. It will steal your yarn.
mbx.items.pet_white_cat.name: White Cat
mbx.items.pet_wyrmling.lore: Don't be fooled by its size, this dragon can toast bread and your enemies... lightly.
mbx.items.pet_wyrmling.name: Wyrmling
mbx.items.piece_blue_starfish.lore: Shard of blue sea, fragment of a star, mysterious and shimmering.
mbx.items.piece_blue_starfish.name: Piece of blue starfish
mbx.items.piece_orange_starfish.lore: Orange fragment, of a sea star, shines brightly.
mbx.items.piece_orange_starfish.name: Piece of orange starfish
mbx.items.pilot_hat.lore: Required for take-off, optional for landings, selfies sold separately.
mbx.items.pilot_hat.name: Cap-tain
mbx.items.pineapple.lore: A fruit so spiky, yet people put it on pizza. Truly, no gods watch over us.
mbx.items.pineapple.name: Pineapple
mbx.items.pineapple_belt.lore: Pants slipping? This belt tightens your grip and your fruity resolve.
mbx.items.pineapple_belt.name: Pineapple Belt
mbx.items.pineapple_boots.lore: Kick your enemies with a tropical twist. Comfy, yet surprisingly tangy.
mbx.items.pineapple_boots.name: Pineapple Boots
mbx.items.pineapple_cape.lore: Feel the wind in your fronds with this cape. Pineapple power, activate!
mbx.items.pineapple_cape.name: Pineapple Cape
mbx.items.pineapple_chestplate.lore: Armored with tropical flavor, this chestplate keeps you ripe and ready for battle.
mbx.items.pineapple_chestplate.name: Pineapple Chestplate
mbx.items.pineapple_hat.lore: Pointy crown sits on top, sweet juice waits underneath, painful surprise comes on removal.
mbx.items.pineapple_hat.name: Spineapple Hat
mbx.items.pineapple_helmet.lore: A fruity choice for a headgear. Protects you and keeps you juicy.
mbx.items.pineapple_helmet.name: Pineapple Helmet
mbx.items.pineapple_leggings.lore: These leggings offer a sweet defense while ensuring you stay stylishly fruity.
mbx.items.pineapple_leggings.name: Pineapple Leggings
mbx.items.pineapple_necklace.lore: A necklace fit for the tropically inclined. Stylish and utterly delicious.
mbx.items.pineapple_necklace.name: Pineapple Necklace
mbx.items.pineapple_ring.lore: Adorn your finger with this zesty ring. Adds flavor to every handshake.
mbx.items.pineapple_ring.name: Pineapple Ring
mbx.items.pirate_crab_claws.lore: Arr matey, crack open these claws, for a pirate's feast.
mbx.items.pirate_crab_claws.name: Pirate Crab Claws
mbx.items.pirate_farmer_bandana.lore: Smells of salt, sweat, and sea. Not necessarily in that order.
mbx.items.pirate_farmer_bandana.name: Pirate Farmer Bandana
mbx.items.plant_belladonna.lore: Beware the bite of this deadly beauty, it’s perfect for your potion brewing.
mbx.items.plant_belladonna.name: Belladonna Plant
mbx.items.plant_chamomile.lore: Calming and soothing, this chamomile is your ticket to a good night's sleep.
mbx.items.plant_chamomile.name: Chamomile Plant
mbx.items.plant_clover.lore: Lucky and rare, finding one means fortune is on your side!
mbx.items.plant_clover.name: Clover Plant
mbx.items.plant_echinacea.lore: Boost your defenses with this prickly healer, nature's own shield.
mbx.items.plant_echinacea.name: Echinacea Plant
mbx.items.plant_five_leaf_clover.lore: Luckier than a four-leaf, this clover will make your wishes come true.
mbx.items.plant_five_leaf_clover.name: Five Leaf Clover Plant
mbx.items.plant_foxglove.lore: Tall and toxic, this foxglove is the gardener's dangerous delight.
mbx.items.plant_foxglove.name: Foxglove Plant
mbx.items.plant_ginger_root.lore: Spice up your life with this zesty root, a cook's best friend.
mbx.items.plant_ginger_root.name: Ginger Root Plant
mbx.items.plant_heart_blue.lore: A rare bloom of deep devotion, thrives in the cold, and withers under doubt.
mbx.items.plant_heart_blue.name: Blue Heartvine
mbx.items.plant_heart_red.lore: Burning with passion, it flourishes in love, but wilts in betrayal.
mbx.items.plant_heart_red.name: Red Heartvine
mbx.items.plant_heart_yellow.lore: Glowing with warmth, a symbol of friendship, unless plucked in jealousy.
mbx.items.plant_heart_yellow.name: Yellow Heartvine
mbx.items.plant_hemlock.lore: Notorious and lethal, this hemlock is perfect for your mischievous concoctions.
mbx.items.plant_hemlock.name: Hemlock Plant
mbx.items.plant_henbane.lore: Beware the madness, this henbane plant is both a bane and a boon.
mbx.items.plant_henbane.name: Henbane Plant
mbx.items.plant_lily.lore: Graceful and pure, even monsters pause to admire it.
mbx.items.plant_lily.name: Lily Plant
mbx.items.plant_mandrake.lore: Screaming root of legend, this mandrake is your magical ally.
mbx.items.plant_mandrake.name: Mandrake Plant
mbx.items.plant_mullein.lore: Soft and fluffy, this mullein leaf is the herbalist's cushion.
mbx.items.plant_mullein.name: Mullein Plant
mbx.items.plant_origami_flower.lore: Folded perfection, this origami flower never wilts, a crafter's joy.
mbx.items.plant_origami_flower.name: Origami Flower Plant
mbx.items.plant_peppermint.lore: Cool and refreshing, this peppermint is your go-to for minty freshness.
mbx.items.plant_peppermint.name: Peppermint Plant
mbx.items.plant_snowdrop.lore: Delicate and pure, this snowdrop heralds the end of winter's chill.
mbx.items.plant_snowdrop.name: Snowdrop Plant
mbx.items.plant_st_johns_wort.lore: Bright and sunny, this plant chases away the darkest clouds.
mbx.items.plant_st_johns_wort.name: St. John's Wort Plant
mbx.items.plant_yarrow.lore: Wound healer and warrior, this yarrow is the soldier's savior.
mbx.items.plant_yarrow.name: Yarrow Plant
mbx.items.poisoned_mosquito_stinger.lore: A tiny weapon, with deadly precision. Don't poke yourself.
mbx.items.poisoned_mosquito_stinger.name: Poisoned Mosquito Stinger
mbx.items.poop.lore: A steaming monument to nature's humor, this stinky relic reminds us that even the strongest heroes need breaks.
mbx.items.poop.name: Poop
mbx.items.popsicle_hat.lore: Brain freeze guaranteed, fashion sense questionable, but hey, it's cold up there!
mbx.items.popsicle_hat.name: Popsicle Hat
mbx.items.potion_aquatic_breathing.lore: Dive deep with this potion, giving you gills and a fish's grace.
mbx.items.potion_aquatic_breathing.name: Aquatic Breathing Potion
mbx.items.potion_base.lore: A foundation for any potion, this base is essential.
mbx.items.potion_base.name: Potion Base
mbx.items.potion_camouflage.lore: Blend in like a chameleon, this potion is your stealthy ally.
mbx.items.potion_camouflage.name: Camouflage Potion
mbx.items.potion_electric.lore: Bottled lightning, zap your enemies or your nerves, handle with zero care.
mbx.items.potion_electric.name: Electric Potion
mbx.items.potion_exotic_plant.lore: A taste of the wild, this potion holds exotic flora.
mbx.items.potion_exotic_plant.name: Exotic Plant Potion
mbx.items.potion_greater_energy.lore: Boost your stamina with this potent potion of energy.
mbx.items.potion_greater_energy.name: Greater Energy Potion
mbx.items.potion_greater_healing.lore: Heal major wounds with this powerful potion of recovery.
mbx.items.potion_greater_healing.name: Greater Healing Potion
mbx.items.potion_memory.lore: Recall lost thoughts with this potion of memory restoration.
mbx.items.potion_memory.name: Memory Potion
mbx.items.potion_minor_energy.lore: A small boost, this potion gives a quick lift.
mbx.items.potion_minor_energy.name: Minor Energy Potion
mbx.items.potion_minor_healing.lore: Heal minor wounds with this gentle potion of recovery.
mbx.items.potion_minor_healing.name: Minor Healing Potion
mbx.items.potion_night_vision.lore: See in the dark, this potion grants night vision.
mbx.items.potion_night_vision.name: Night Vision Potion
mbx.items.potion_resistance.lore: Boost your defenses, this potion grants resistance.
mbx.items.potion_resistance.name: Resistance Potion
mbx.items.potion_small.lore: Shrink to the size of a mouse! This potion makes everything else look gigantic.
mbx.items.potion_small.name: Minimization Potion
mbx.items.potion_speed.lore: Move like the wind, this potion grants incredible speed.
mbx.items.potion_speed.name: Speed Potion
mbx.items.potion_strength.lore: Gain the power, this potion grants great strength.
mbx.items.potion_strength.name: Strength Potion
mbx.items.productivity_boost_1.descripti: Place in a building's Boost slot to boost its production rate.
mbx.items.productivity_boost_1.lore: Made from ground coffee beans and questionable alchemy. Your villagers won't sleep tonight.
mbx.items.productivity_boost_1.name: Basic Productivity Boost
mbx.items.productivity_boost_2.descripti: Place in a building's Boost slot to greatly boost its production rate.
mbx.items.productivity_boost_2.lore: The recipe involves three eggs, a moonstone, and a motivational speech. Don't ask in what order.
mbx.items.productivity_boost_2.name: Enhanced Productivity Boost
mbx.items.productivity_boost_3.descripti: Place in a building's Boost slot to massively boost its production rate.
mbx.items.productivity_boost_3.lore: Rumor says the inventor tested it on himself first. He's been running in circles since Tuesday.
mbx.items.productivity_boost_3.name: Superior Productivity Boost
mbx.items.protein_meat_bar.lore: The gym rat's delight, packed with more protein than you can lift.
mbx.items.protein_meat_bar.name: Protein Meat Bar
mbx.items.prow_1.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's navigation.
mbx.items.prow_1.lore: Carved by a sculptor who'd never actually seen the sea. It shows, but we love the effort.
mbx.items.prow_1.name: Wooden Prow
mbx.items.prow_2.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's navigation.
mbx.items.prow_2.lore: The serpent's expression suggests it's judging every wave. Honestly, same.
mbx.items.prow_2.name: Serpent Prow
mbx.items.prow_3.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's navigation.
mbx.items.prow_3.lore: Strikes fear into enemy hearts. Also strikes fear into docks when you forget to brake.
mbx.items.prow_3.name: Dragon Prow
mbx.items.prow_4.description: A ship component used to upgrade your vessel's navigation.
mbx.items.prow_4.lore: Legend says it burst into flames once and rebuilt itself. The insurance company still hasn't recovered.
mbx.items.prow_4.name: Phoenix Prow
mbx.items.puddle_backpack.lore: Holds everything except your dignity, which was lost in the first puddle.
mbx.items.puddle_backpack.name: Puddle Backpack
mbx.items.puddle_boots.lore: Splashing through mud like it's a fashion statement. Spoiler: It's not.
mbx.items.puddle_boots.name: Puddle Boots
mbx.items.puddle_boots_1.description: Gives x2 drops when jumping in puddle.
mbx.items.puddle_boots_1.lore: Hot pink rubber boots. More fashion crime than waterproof gear.
mbx.items.puddle_boots_1.name: Puddle Boots (Pink)
mbx.items.puddle_boots_2.description: Gives x3 drops when jumping in puddle.
mbx.items.puddle_boots_2.lore: Fiery red for the angry stomper in you. Certified rage-proof.
mbx.items.puddle_boots_2.name: Puddle Boots (Red)
mbx.items.puddle_boots_3.description: Gives x4 drops when jumping in puddle.
mbx.items.puddle_boots_3.lore: Calm blue, like the ocean. Or a very sad rainy day.
mbx.items.puddle_boots_3.name: Puddle Boots (Blue)
mbx.items.puddle_boots_4.description: Gives x5 drops when jumping in puddle.
mbx.items.puddle_boots_4.lore: Bright yellow rubber. Guaranteed to make you look like a soaked duck.
mbx.items.puddle_boots_4.name: Puddle Boots (Yellow)
mbx.items.puddle_chestplate.lore: Armored against raindrops. Not so great against sarcastic comments.
mbx.items.puddle_chestplate.name: Puddle Chestplate
mbx.items.puddle_helmet.lore: Protects your head from raindrops and terrible hair days. Barely.
mbx.items.puddle_helmet.name: Puddle Helmet
mbx.items.puddle_leggings.lore: Perfect for waddling through knee-deep muck. Not much else.
mbx.items.puddle_leggings.name: Puddle Leggings
mbx.items.rabbit_chicken_mix.lore: When rabbit meets chicken, they blend into a culinary masterpiece.
mbx.items.rabbit_chicken_mix.name: Rabbit Chicken Mix
mbx.items.rainbow_sparkle_jelly_salad.lo: Sparkling and bright, a magical mix, a feast for the eyes!
mbx.items.rainbow_spinner_hat.lore: Spins gently in any breeze forecasting your current mood and wildly embarrassing indoors.
mbx.items.rainbow_spinner_hat.name: Mood Beanie
mbx.items.rainbow_stone_plate.lore: A plate of pure rainbow stone, radiating all the colors.
mbx.items.rainbow_stone_plate.name: Rainbow Stone Plate
mbx.items.rattling_bones.lore: Shake for a spooky sound. Perfect for pranks, or terrible music.
mbx.items.rattling_bones.name: Rattling Bones
mbx.items.reaper.name: {{key0}} Reaper
mbx.items.red_cocktail.lore: Fiery and bold, each sip ignites, a burst of flavor.
mbx.items.red_cocktail.name: Red cocktail
mbx.items.red_wood_plaque.lore: Bold and beautiful, a sign of achievement, from redwood forests.
mbx.items.red_wood_plaque.name: Red Wood Plaque
mbx.items.red_wood_superplaque.lore: Grand and impressive, for the best of the best, a prize to cherish.
mbx.items.red_wood_superplaque.name: Red Wood Superplaque
mbx.items.reinforced_plank.lore: A plank built to last. Metal brackets, bolts, and zero trust in wood.
mbx.items.reinforced_plank.name: Reinforced Plank
mbx.items.reptile_leather.lore: Smooth and scaly, shed by serpents, prized by the finest tanners.
mbx.items.reptile_leather.name: Reptile Leather
mbx.items.ring_agility.lore: Grants you speed and grace to dance through battles like a feather in the wind.
mbx.items.ring_agility.name: Fleetfoot Ring
mbx.items.ring_bagouze_blue.lore: A ring that sparks laughter and mirth wherever it's worn, perfect for pranksters.
mbx.items.ring_bagouze_blue.name: Jester's Jest
mbx.items.ring_bagouze_green.lore: Wear this for a cheeky smirk, a mischievous glint in your eye, and a touch of chaos.
mbx.items.ring_bagouze_green.name: Goblin's Grin
mbx.items.ring_bagouze_pink.lore: A ring that twinkles with magic, casting playful illusions that leave friends bewildered.
mbx.items.ring_bagouze_pink.name: Pixie Prank
mbx.items.ring_bagouze_yellow.lore: This ring glows with mischief, always ready for the next great trick or jest.
mbx.items.ring_bagouze_yellow.name: Trickster's Token
mbx.items.ring_beautiful_blue.lore: A beautiful ring that calms the mind and spirit, bringing peace to its wearer.
mbx.items.ring_beautiful_blue.name: Serenity Band
mbx.items.ring_beautiful_green.lore: Emits a soothing aura that connects you with nature's tranquil rhythms.
mbx.items.ring_beautiful_green.name: Harmony Circle
mbx.items.ring_beautiful_orange.lore: Captures the warm glow of a setting sun, radiating comfort and joy.
mbx.items.ring_beautiful_orange.name: Sunset Halo
mbx.items.ring_beautiful_purple.lore: Holds the mystery of twilight, with a shimmer that sparks curiosity and wonder.
mbx.items.ring_beautiful_purple.name: Twilight Charm
mbx.items.ring_big_gem_blue.lore: A massive gem that reflects the depths of the ocean's endless mysteries.
mbx.items.ring_big_gem_blue.name: Ocean's Eye
mbx.items.ring_big_gem_green.lore: This gem carries the essence of ancient forests, teeming with life and secrets.
mbx.items.ring_big_gem_green.name: Forest's Heart
mbx.items.ring_big_gem_pink.lore: A dazzling gem that captures the beauty of a blooming rose, radiating love.
mbx.items.ring_big_gem_pink.name: Rose Gem
mbx.items.ring_big_gem_yellow.lore: Holds the brilliance of the midday sun, shining with radiant energy.
mbx.items.ring_big_gem_yellow.name: Sunburst Jewel
mbx.items.ring_caramelized.lore: A ring so sweet and tempting, it'll melt the hardest hearts, and stick to fingers.
mbx.items.ring_caramelized.name: Sugarcoat Band
mbx.items.ring_creamy_black.lore: A creamy dark ring that hints at decadent mysteries, rich and velvety.
mbx.items.ring_creamy_black.name: Midnight Delight
mbx.items.ring_creamy_blue.lore: Captures the essence of sweet blueberries in a smooth, creamy form.
mbx.items.ring_creamy_blue.name: Blueberry Bliss
mbx.items.ring_creamy_white.lore: A creamy white ring that exudes pure, sweet vanilla, dreamy and delightful.
mbx.items.ring_creamy_white.name: Vanilla Dream
mbx.items.ring_cute_blue.lore: A ring so cute and charming, it'll bring a smile to any face it graces.
mbx.items.ring_cute_blue.name: Charming Cobalt
mbx.items.ring_cute_green.lore: This ring's cuteness rivals that of a newborn kitten, innocent and pure.
mbx.items.ring_cute_green.name: Adorable Emerald
mbx.items.ring_cute_purple.lore: A sweet ring that embodies the gentle beauty of lavender, soft and enchanting.
mbx.items.ring_cute_purple.name: Lovely Lavender
mbx.items.ring_cute_red.lore: Adorable yet fiery, this ring captures the passionate spirit of a lively heart.
mbx.items.ring_cute_red.name: Precious Ruby
mbx.items.ring_eagle_bronze.lore: Grants the wearer sharp vision, and the strength to soar above life's challenges.
mbx.items.ring_eagle_bronze.name: Eagle's Gaze
mbx.items.ring_eagle_silver.lore: With this ring, see far and wide, and stay vigilant against all threats.
mbx.items.ring_eagle_silver.name: Hawk's Vigil
mbx.items.ring_eyed_blue.lore: A ring with an eye that sees all, ensuring no secrets are hidden from you.
mbx.items.ring_eyed_blue.name: Watcher’s Band
mbx.items.ring_eyed_green.lore: Holds a curious eye that searches for truth and reveals hidden paths.
mbx.items.ring_eyed_green.name: Seeker’s Signet
mbx.items.ring_eyed_pink.lore: A playful ring with an eye that winks and blinks, always watching over you.
mbx.items.ring_eyed_pink.name: Peeper’s Perch
mbx.items.ring_eyed_yellow.lore: This ring's eye gleams with the light of a thousand suns, piercing any darkness.
mbx.items.ring_eyed_yellow.name: Gazer’s Glint
